name: Steve Beshear
subject: Four More Years of Bevin is Scary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I don't scare easily. But one thing that does scare me is the possibility of another four years of Matt Bevin as Kentucky's governor.
|
---

| | Peter,

I don't scare easily. But one thing that does scare me is the possibility of another four years of **Matt Bevin** as Kentucky's governor. He's spent his time in office attacking our school teachers, cutting pensions for public employees like firefighters and police officers, and trying to kick families off their health insurance. Kentucky deserves better.

**In order to beat Matt Bevin, Andy and his team need your help to make the most of these last few days before the election. Tonight is their October end-of-month deadline, so will you pitch in to help them reach their $45,000 goal? Every donation made before midnight tomorrow will be matched $1-for-$1!** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70ade/3814038910/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030.2nd__419__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70adf/3814038910/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030.2nd__419__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70adc/3814038910/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030.2nd__419__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70add/3814038910/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030.2nd__419__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70ad0/3814038910/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030.2nd__419__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70ad1/3814038910/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?refcode=20191030.2nd__419__")** Election Day is just days away, and I'm so proud of the campaign Andy has run up to this point. While he sure doesn't have to worry about my vote, he's out campaigning until the minute the polls close to persuade those last few undecided voters.

Thanks for your support, and have a safe and happy Halloween!

\-- Steve Beshear | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255799f/ad6dc73/1443f060/db70ad4/3814038910/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeom?refcode=20191030.2nd__419__&amount=5")**

body:

| Good Evening, Team -

We just checked ActBlue, and it looks like we only need **_23 more donors_** from Pennsylvania to stay on track to meet our **$175,OOO Halloween goal!**

Michael's spent his time in public service fighting for enduring solutions to our nation's greatest challenges -- not the media spotlight.

[While other candidates have been building celebrity-like political status for years or decades, many voters are only meeting Michael for the first time now.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaea5/134673f2/a36ab5a/6997f6a2/4045386210/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B3_103019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

But team, the more they hear from Michael, the more they like what he has to say!

[Hitting this goal would go a long way to show undecided voters that this campaign is fighting for real progress. Can Michael count on you to make your first donation today?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaea5/134673f2/a36ab5a/6997f6a2/4045386210/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B3_103019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc867/3eb3e2fc/5593d785/744dbbac/3770715698/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc867/3eb3e2fc/5593d785/744dbbab/3770715698/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc867/3eb3e2fc/5593d785/744dbbaa/3770715698/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Not just another email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We get it –– you’re probably thinking, great, another fundraising email.
If you’ve been scrolling through your inbox, you might have noticed that
you’re receiving a lot of emails from campaigns or organizations asking
you to make a donation before the end of the month.

But to be perfectly honest with you –– we’re not like a lot of those other
campaigns. We’re not swimming in cash. Your donation isn’t going to a
rainy day fund (we need the money now). We made a promise to not take any
money from PACs or special interests, and we’re sticking to it.

We’re ready to prove to you why donating to our campaign goes a whole lot
farther than donating to anyone else in fighting to defeat Trump and bring
courage back to our politics. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41641?refcode=ema20191030-64602&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3 ]Please read why and then chip in
$3 to help us reach our critical fundraising goal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41641?refcode=ema20191030-64602&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3 ]Contribute $3

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41641?refcode=ema20191030-64602&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3 ][IMG]

There is an unprecedented number of candidates in this race with all sorts
of approaches to politics.

Some of them have connections to wealthy donors that have helped them for
decades. Some of them know which backs like being scratched. And some of
them just think that the best way to beat Trump is stashing as much money
as possible, no matter where it comes from.

What do we have? We have a movement. It started last year in Texas when we
defied conventional wisdom that you can’t compete against an establishment
force without PAC money. We proved what’s possible when you put people
(not corporations or special interests) first in politics. We also proved
that when you focus more on the issues people actually care about and less
about scoring political points –– people trust you.

Defeating Trump is important, but this election is about so much more than
winning. It’s about electing the values and vision we want for our
country. That’s what makes Beto’s message so special in this race and why
we need to make sure he’s able to keep pushing every candidate in this
race to be fearless in fighting for a progressive agenda.

A people-powered movement like ours depends on the donations we receive
from emails like these to fuel our work. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41641?refcode=ema20191030-64602&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3 ]We’re not asking for a
lot, even just $5 makes a
huge difference in helping us reach our goal and make ends meet. Please
chip in whatever you can now.

– Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41641?refcode=ema20191030-64602&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3 ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191030footer&t=1024&refcode2=64602_444211_xlIP_3&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=64602%2E444211%2ExlIP_3

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Defeating Trump is important, but this election is about so much more than winning. It’s about electing the values and vision we want for our country. That’s what makes Beto’s message so special in this race and why we need to make sure he’s able to keep pushing every candidate in this race to be fearless in fighting for a progressive agenda. A people-powered movement like ours depends on the donations we receive from emails like these to fuel our work. [ ]We’re not asking for a lot, even just $5 makes a huge difference in helping us reach our goal and make ends meet. Please chip in whatever you can now. – Team Beto [ ]Contribute Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd, Finance Director
subject: The clock is ticking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Time is running out, and we're still 283 supporters short of our monthly goal, so I'm reaching out to all of Mark's supporters with an urgent request.
|
---
| | **Countdown to End-of-Month** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a53/1650664674/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
Derek,

In about 24 hours, we have our October fundraising deadline, and I'll need to report back to Mark whether we hit our 400 new supporter goal or fell short this month.

Here's how it breaks down for our campaign. Hitting our monthly goals now means we can plan for the future: hiring new staff, setting ad budgets, and growing our voter registration and outreach efforts. Unfortunately, if we fall short, we'll have to scale back. With Virginia in the Trump campaign's crosshairs for 2020, we simply can't afford to do that, and that's why I'm asking for your help.

**The clock is ticking, and we're still 283 supporters short of our monthly goal, so I'm reaching out to all of Mark's supporters with an urgent request. Will you chip in before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline and help Mark stay on track to win in 2020?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a52/1650664674/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a51/1650664674/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a50/1650664674/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a5f/1650664674/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a5e/1650664674/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a5d/1650664674/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
The fact is, Mark's GOP opponents are looking for us to fall short this month. They'll use any slip-up by this campaign as an opportunity to flip Virginia red, help re-elect Donald Trump, and defend the Republican majority in the Senate.

It'd be nice if we could just relax and coast to a victory next November, but it's just not going to be that easy. **Mark won by less than 1% in 2014, and winning this time around is going to take all of us working together -- hitting every goal, so we don't give his GOP opponents an opportunity to flip this seat.**

We're close to our 400 new supporter goal, but we need your help before midnight on Thursday to get there. **[Will you chip in now?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a53/1650664674/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thanks,

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01d/53d9897e/5203c585/1c890a5c/1650664674/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct2019eomnd?refcode=20191030nd__307__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Is Hillary Going to Run Again?
body:
Hillary for President, Again? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Is Hillary Going to Run Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Hillary is still out there claiming she won the presidential election, and now she's making noises that she might run again in 2020. Besides Hillary, there are also rumors of several other candidates that still might jump into the Democrat's primary pool - Michelle Obama, Oprah? In this week's blog, I let you know what I think of Hillary's and other potential candidate's chances of jumping in. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [When You're The Front-Runner, You're the Target](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-d/)
About two months ago I made a prediction that Elizabeth Warren was the person most likely to be the Democratic nominee for president. Was my prediction correct? This week I discuss why criticisms of Warren's radical policies and ultra-leftist thinking are evidence that this prediction may very well be true. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Reason to Celebrate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-u/)
I recently spoke to a gathering of pro-life constituents on our shared commitment to protect innocent unborn lives. Calling it a "Thanksgiving Vigil," we were gathered to reflect and celebrate advancement in our pro-life mission. In this week's blog, I discuss the reason why we were celebrating and how this news is another accomplishment in our battle to protect those who are the most vulnerable. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Impeachment and the Economy](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-n/)
Back in 1992, Bill Clinton's campaign manager, James Carville, successfully used the slogan "it's the economy, stupid" to defeat George H.W. Bush for the presidency. So how is the economy looking this election cycle, and what impact will that have on President Trump's bid for winning a second term? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-e/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jddjttdk-l-s)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jddjttdk-961825B2-kujkulhluu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jddjttdk-kujkulhluu-w/)

name: Tina Smith
subject: October
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
With Jason Lewis, Trump, and the GOP putting all of their efforts into turning Minnesota red, we need to fight harder than ever before. That's why I'm determined to meet this end-of-month benchmark to

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191030eom3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

This month we have seen the full effects of Trump's attention in Minnesota.

FIRST: Trump endorsed Jason Lewis at his rally, and _The New York Times_ reports that he plans to spend tens of millions of dollars here this cycle.

THEN: Moody's Analytics released their forecast showing Trump can win here.

NOW: _The Washington Post_ reported that Minnesota could be key to the Republicans holding their Senate Majority.

With Jason Lewis, Trump, and the GOP putting all of their efforts into turning Minnesota red, we need to fight harder than ever before. There's too much at stake - from health care to action on climate change - to take anything for granted. That is why I'm determined to meet this end-of-month benchmark to outpace Republican threats.

**We still need to raise $3,969 to hit our goal before the month is out, but I'm going to need your help to do it.** **[Before tomorrow's midnight deadline, can you chip in $10, $25, $50 or more so we keep Minnesota blue?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191030eom3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc40613/c1f7015/67319c1c/1145076a/1707289971/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW9jdDIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDMwZW9tMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191030eom3-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: New Hampshire poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Last week I completed **my 105-mile walk across New Hampshire**. I took to the streets because **actions speak louder than words** — and it seems the people of New Hampshire heard my footsteps:
**In the latest CNN/University of New Hampshire poll**, I’m now ahead of a sitting senator, a former cabinet secretary, and a former Congressman who’s spent millions on his campaign. I’m also within the margin of error against Beto O’Rourke, Cory Booker, Kamala Harris and Tom Steyer — high-profile candidates who all have millions more than my campaign.

**I can keep rising in the polls** if I can keep advertising on TV — but the only way to do that is **with your help**.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11384689/115879130/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY3ZGY3Yi1jYWZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLywSiHfZq2b1uLIhwjVyyLn608O1rEDZucyuvrE_34=&refcode=em103019poll)
I’m the only candidate with the depth and breadth of global experience necessary to restore US leadership abroad — and with a distinguished record of service and sacrifice that can **unite this whole country**.
Thank you for your support, Joe
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11384690/115879131/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY3ZGY3Yi1jYWZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLywSiHfZq2b1uLIhwjVyyLn608O1rEDZucyuvrE_34=&refcode=em103019poll)

body:
I need you now more than ever. |

Friend,

I emailed you.

My sons, Don Jr. and Eric, both emailed you.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

Trump Finance Team emailed you.

_**Now I 'm emailing you. Again.**_

Each day, my team has given me a list of the American Patriots who have stepped up to contribute to our critical End-of-Month fundraising goal.

Each day, I've noticed YOUR name is MISSING. Today is the LAST DAY of the month, and with only 15 hours left before the deadline, we need to finish strong.

Since you're one of my top supporters, I'm reaching out to you to help lead our efforts in your state.
_**All donations made before 11:59 PM TONIGHT will be instantly TRIPLE-MATCHED. **_

subject: Urgent Defend your President from impeachment

body:
An impeachment vote is happening today. Our FEC deadline is happening today.

An impeachment vote is happening TODAY.

Our FEC deadline is happening TODAY.

Your immediate support is needed TODAY.

Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the Democrats are formally accusing our president, President Donald J. Trump, of BETRAYING the American people and his oath of office.

THIS. ENDS. NOW.

****
[**END THE WITCH HUNT:**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53323857:su4v1RwNM:m:1:1155937413:D59DC63EF781EE52CFE2B8D7DFB39A41:r)

**[**5X-MATCH NOW**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53323857:su4v1RwNM:m:1:1155937413:D59DC63EF781EE52CFE2B8D7DFB39A41:r)**

---
But, the only way we can truly defeat the Democrats and their sham investigation is by ending their liberal majority and replacing it with strong Conservative leaders.

That's why I'm reaching out. There's not much time left.

[******I need you to rush your 5X-MATCHED contribution before our midnight FEC deadline to defend our president and fuel critical 2020 efforts.**
****](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53323857:su4v1RwNM:m:1:1155937413:D59DC63EF781EE52CFE2B8D7DFB39A41:r)
This is about your president. This is about your future. Do everything you can to save it.

Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: scary lies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
It’s Halloween and what’s happening in Washington is really scary. Socialists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar are driving the agenda and we are seeing Democrats like Max Rose going along.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=7A10A1A55)
---
| | |
---
| | **Friends-

** It’s Halloween and what’s happening in Washington is really scary.

Socialists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar are driving the agenda and we are seeing Democrats like Max Rose going along.

It’s only been a few months but my opponent has already proven to be a phony, saying one thing on the campaign trail and doing something else in Washington:

* He said he wouldn’t support Nancy Pelosi, but now he is voting with her 97% of the time.

* He said that he opposed impeachment of President Trump but now, after getting a little pressure, he is siding with "the squad" in a partisan witch-hunt.

* He said special interests could "keep their damn money," but now Crain's New York is reporting that just one family with business in our district has put over $100,000 in Rose's coffers.

Even more scary, is the outside special interests trying to buy this election. The majority of my opponent’s money is coming from outside our district, outside our city and outside our state.

[I’m counting on people like you: my friends, neighbors, constituents who are truly affected by the outcome of this election](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=7A10A1A33) and deserve someone who will really represent them in Washington, just as I have in Albany for the past nine years.

Today is our end of month deadline.

[I hope you'll chip in what you can and help me fight back against the socialists, special interests and outside influences!](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=7A10A1A33)

Thank you for your support,
Nicole

name: Team Scholten
subject: Peter, we’ve got you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

J.D.’s not your average congressional candidate. He doesn’t accept corporate PAC contributions because he doesn’t rely on special interests that are lining up to buy this election.

We've got each other.

We'll win one conversation, one donation, one vote at a time. We'll win by telling people straight-up what we believe and why we believe it. We’ll win by going everywhere, talking to everyone, and not writing anyone off -- no matter if they’re a Republican, Democrat, Independent, or someone who’s sworn off politics and politicians.

It’s shameful that we’ve allowed politicians to leave behind small towns, rural communities, farmers, and working families all over this country.

J.D. believes in affordable, comprehensive health care coverage and education for every American, regardless of race, class, or gender. He believes that when you work hard and play by the rules, you should get a chance to make it in this country, regardless of whether you’re from a big city or a rural town.

**_[If you believe it’s past time for Steve King to get the boot and are ready to elect a real leader like J.D. to represent working folks in Congress, then chip in $5 or more before tonight’s end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11392723/115952814/1796747094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGQ5ZTQyNC1lZmZiLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v54HVejrD3Y3HB5GADDLOqJcgrJJPE4ZJQ3poTZ2aTo=&refcode=em19_191031_eom4_l1)_**

name: Judy Lipinski
subject: Let’s chat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
The best part about having a husband who is a member of Congress is being able to meet and chat with all of the great volunteers that are on Team Lipinski.

They are passionate, thoughtful, and enthusiastic. And they’re spreading Dan’s positive, commonsense message all throughout the district!

Can you rush $15 by midnight? Any amount will help keep our volunteers out in the field. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=15&recurring=true]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below.

Donate $15 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=15&express_lane=true]

Donate $25 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Donate $50 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=50&express_lane=true]Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=15&recurring=true]

Dan and I both hate asking for money, but our volunteers are the lifeblood of this campaign, and we can’t miss any of our fundraising deadlines.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=15&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-oct-eom-19?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_191031_1_4&amount=15&recurring=true]

Thank you for standing with Dan!

Judy
Dan's wife

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. name: Mary Mancini
subject: Peter will you help us meet our midnight goal?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
This time of year sees a lot of change. Sunshine and 90° weather turn to chilly rain and cozy sweaters. Backyard burgers and beers give way to slowly simmered stews and red wine. Long days become long nights, and fall foliage starts painting our beautiful Tennessee countryside.
Halloween is here, and soon it will be Thanksgiving then Christmas then New Years. It’s all going by so fast. With everything that’s been in the news it gets hard to come up for air sometimes.
With all that being said, we know it’s a lot to ask – but we really need your help reaching our fundraising goal this month. We have until midnight to raise another $3,080. We know these deadlines might seem trivial – but they’re really important to us. They help us cover the costs of mobilizing and organizing, raising awareness, and standing up for fairness, justice, and freedom. They keep us grounded in our efforts – and right now we could use a little help from our friends. Will you please consider, as we begin this season of giving, making a small contribution today?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Stand With Mark Kelly is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55.
For 2020, we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating Trump and turning Arizona blue. We recruited astronaut Mark Kelly to run for Arizona's US Senate seat, are working to win a key Arizona Congressional seat and to flip both houses of the Arizona State Legislature.
If you'd like to support the Stand With Mark Kelly Campaign, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44c4/4bd7760e/4487d4a5/77ad8dba/321323066/VEsHAg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footerdmk?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=17+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191031_KellyCouldLose_U4_X4&source=314_EM_FR_191031_KellyCouldLose_U4_X4")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44c4/4bd7760e/4487d4a5/77ad8db9/321323066/VEsHDQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=18+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191031_KellyCouldLose_U4_X4&source=314_EM_FR_191031_KellyCouldLose_U4_X4")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44c4/4bd7760e/4487d4a5/77ad8db8/321323066/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191031_KellyCouldLose_U4_X4&source=314_EM_FR_191031_KellyCouldLose_U4_X4")

subject: It’s almost time:

body:
Andrew will be going live at 10 AM ET and call 60 supporters in 60 minutes.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv) Yang Gang --

Andrew will be going live at 10 AM ET to call _60 supporters in 60 minutes._ Do you want the chance to be called by Andrew today?

**Contribute any amount now and Andrew might give you a call to say thanks!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=5&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=8&amount=25&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
All contributions will go toward our goal of $1.5 million by the end of October. Hitting our goal will allow us to go up on TV, make a big statement about the strength of this campaign, and push Andrew up in the polls.

Tune in to the livestream at 10 AM ET at Yang2020.com/live and keep your phone close! **Pitch in for your chance now:**
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=7&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---
Happy Halloween!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15510?t=6&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2434%2E377263%2EnJmlUv) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?Elliot=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: did you see our new website?
body:
Derek, Yesterday, along with the Committee to Elect House Republicans, we launched a big new website - [FlipTheNHHouse.com](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc4OTE1NTQyNTQyOTgwOTkxJmM9dTJuNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODkxMDY3MjAmZD1tNW8ybjJ4.YwevphTKdxVNKd7VlvGzpBkxBDbEdHdUP5XWGtRvQZg) \- to hold the Democrats who are destroying New Hampshire accountable. You can use this website to see how Democrats in districts across New Hampshire have voted throughout the past legislative session, and please utilize the interactive map to find the Democrat State Representative near you and how they have voted. We need to retake the House in 2020, and the NHGOP and the Committee to Elect House Republicans are dedicated to doing so. We’ve launched digital ads holding House Democrats accountable this week while promoting our incumbent Republicans who have held strong. To sustain our digital ads, we need your support - [can you donate today?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc4OTE1NTQyNTQyOTgwOTkxJmM9dTJuNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODkxMDY3MjImZD11MGMweTVi.gkHVxCySAxd_HlRHFqLa-VixRXCIkK4EMnGinNZ1D-8) Your donation through [this special campaign page](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc4OTE1NTQyNTQyOTgwOTkxJmM9dTJuNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODkxMDY3MjQmZD1yM28ybjV2.h0QnuHcX8baz2JymOv50xU6k_5fKw6FFFL64W_d_VsM) will be split between the NHGOP and the Committee to Elect House Republicans, empowering both of our organizations to have the funds needed to be successfully next November. Thank you for all you do, Elliot Gault
NHGOP Executive Director P.S. We will only take back the House next year with your investment - [invest in the NHGOP and the CTEHR with your donation today.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc4OTE1NTQyNTQyOTgwOTkxJmM9dTJuNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODkxMDY3MjYmZD1uNWg5bjli.ziYBWHNSEukQUPTxOtBh6ZWgdP4xHrIfzPQnR5CiomM) Sent from my iPhone
* * *
######

This email was sent to [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc4OTE1NTQyNTQyOTgwOTkxJmM9dTJuNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODkxMDgwNTYmZD14MHg2ZzBs.adrNR8r1XrqwI16toTTog8Hlb-yfPdA4vqoAnz7xLKo) | [Forward this email to a friend](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjc4OTE1NTQyNTQyOTgwOTkxJmM9dTJuNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODkxMDY3MjgmZD1sN3cxeDl0.TVUAiZJVUEyE6g8lGj0vFklYjlXOeDaZ6ffThPdEtEg)

name: Jason Yates
subject: This is a scary thought - Clinton vs. Trump rematch in 2020?
body:
| | Hi Peter, In a recent Twitter exchange between President Trump and Hillary Clinton, Trump challenged her to enter the race, and Clinton responded, “don’t tempt me”. If Clinton and Trump go head to head in 2020, we might all think we’ve woken up on “Groundhog Day” - it would be a repeat race all over again. Many Democrats believe having Hillary Clinton back on the Democratic ticket may not be such a bad idea since so many of the Democratic front runners seem to be struggling. Vice President Joe Biden is twisted up in the Ukraine controversy, Elizabeth Warren can’t seem to answer how she will pay for “Medicare for All”, and Senator Bernie Sanders suffered a heart attack on the campaign trail only a few weeks ago. **One thing is certain - no matter who is on the presidential ticket - it is more important now than ever that you stand for your values.** If you want to see your values protected -
* Freedom to act and speak according to your religious convictions
* Life that is celebrated and protected because every person is created by God
* Marriage and family that originates on the foundation of biblical sexuality and as a covenant between a man and woman
* The call on each Christian to care for others in need because God declares them worthy

Then you must vote and motivate other Christians to do the same. _Remember, 25 million Christians who were registered to vote remained silent in the last election._ They likely won’t get involved this time either - unless they are mobilized, encouraged and equipped to vote. **You can do something to change this.** We know we’re in for a wild ride in the months leading up to the election. A lot could still change, from the front runner candidates to the issues that land front and center on the national stage. But what won’t change are the principles we fight for and vote for. Right now, link arms with this sweeping movement to empower and mobilize Christians in 2020 [and donate today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e191031apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031apl01nd&n=1). We’re not trying to “take a political office” or champion a political party. Our goal is to redeem the public square through the name of Jesus. Together, let's elect leaders who recognize and uphold the authority of God over government. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e191031apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031apl01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031apl01nd&n=3)
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031apl01nd&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031apl01nd&n=7)

name: Tom Szymanski, Campaign Manager
subject: Fwd: Nothing scarier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
We’ve launched a “Halloween Money Bomb” to reach our monthly fundraising goal, and we now have less than 24 hours until our deadline!
Fellow Conservative, Did you see Jason’s message? It’s time-sensitive, and he asked me to follow up. We’ve launched a “Halloween Money Bomb” to reach our monthly fundraising goal, and we now have less than 24 hours until our deadline! **[Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to help us reach our goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/1d3f1ab1ae513812c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** As Jason said, there’s nothing scarier than the radical agenda that the socialist Democrats want to force on Minnesota and America. That’s why we’re working relentlessly to DEFEAT ultra-liberal Tina Smith on November 3, 2020, and we can’t let up for a minute! **[Stand with President Trump and conservatives across Minnesota to help Jason win](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/b0028dfb93f7f040c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**. With just over a year until Election Day 2020, there’s no time to waste! All the best, Tom [ Halloween Money Bomb: DEADLINE TONIGHT! >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/e93126668958e090c3d6b838967d376c/33183) | |

From: Jason Lewis
To: Tom Szymanski
Date: Wednesday, October 30, 2019 5:00PM
Subject: Nothing scarier
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/caedbaaa8a6bbfeac3d6b838967d376c/33183)
Tom,

I just met with my team... and after running the numbers, **we have an URGENT goal.**

It’s vital that we close our October fundraising strong!

**[Today we’re launching our “Halloween Money Bomb”](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/cb11c20482515dfec3d6b838967d376c/33183) **to raise the $5,134 we still need to reach our monthly goal. Our deadline is at 11:59 p.m. tomorrow.

With JUST DAYS to go, I hope to count on your help. Let’s face it... witches, ghosts, and goblins have nothing on these radical-left socialist Democrats.

There is NOTHING scarier than the agenda Ilhan Omar and Tina Smith have for America!

**[Please make a $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or $500 contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/fa108b740dfaadf9c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**.
[ Halloween Money Bomb: Help us Reach Goal! >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/49a8db8011337bcfc3d6b838967d376c/33183)
We’re gearing up for the most aggressive and hard-fought U.S. Senate campaign in Minnesota in decades. I’m in this race to win, and so is President Trump, who has given me his enthusiastic endorsement.

**[With supporters like you on board, I know we can take back our great state!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/7e71cf8dc7c4ff89c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**

These radical Democrats aren’t like the Democrats of yesteryear. They hate everything America stands for.

They want higher taxes, socialized medicine, and open borders... and just weeks ago, we saw how their supporters – brain-dead leftist zombies – will take to the streets to violently attack conservatives and the police!

**We MUST take back Minnesota in 2020.** This is our chance to help re-elect President Trump and fire do-nothing ultra-liberal Tina Smith. It’s time we ALL step up to make happen.

**[Please help with our “Halloween Money Bomb” fundraising campaign today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/3101d004cf0445ec/5a22aa791f7fafebc3d6b838967d376c/33183).**

Thank you for ALL your support in this race!

\- Jason

name: Corky's Finance Team
subject: Fwd: Let's turn New Hampshire “RED” in 2020!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
The response to our 72-hour “Money Bomb” has been incredible... and YOU can put us over the top!
Peter,

This is a quick follow-up to Corky’s message the other day.

**The response to our 72-hour “Money Bomb” has been incredible... and YOU can put us over the top!**

We split up our goal by ZIP code, and we’re now just $95 short for 18326.

**[If you haven’t chipped in yet, please take a moment to do so now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a7cf61704e216622/fff513437339aef6c3d6b838967d376c/33153). **

Stand with Corky in this race to defeat Jeanne Shaheen, so he can stand up for freedom, free markets, secure borders, our military and veterans, our individual rights and the right to life.

Our deadline is coming up fast at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT! [ Put us over the top! Chip in HERE >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a7cf61704e216622/630f90942bf9ded9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
From: Corky Messner
To: All Supporters
Subject: Let's turn New Hampshire "RED" in 2020!

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a7cf61704e216622/d2e7cb3a437be0f2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Peter,

Does the number 2,736 ring a bell?

We’ve mentioned it several times over the last few weeks. It’s the number of votes Hillary Clinton carried New Hampshire by in 2016.

**It was an incredibly narrow margin... and in 2020, we need to flip it.**

It’s vital that we turn New Hampshire “RED” next year, to help re-elect President Trump and DEFEAT liberal Jeanne Shaheen!

That’s what we’re working to make happen every single day, and we can’t let up.

Today, we’re launching an urgent 72-hour “Money Bomb” to raise $2,736 to close out October strong!

[**Will you donate $5 (or more if you can) to help us reach our goal?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a7cf61704e216622/6abd5d3d9c1233f0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

With just over a year until Election Day, this race is heating up fast. The national Democrat campaign machine is desperate to re-elect Jeanne Shaheen... and we cannot allow them to fool voters!

**She DOES NOT represent our values, period**. We must expose her record and radical views, and build the strong statewide grassroots team it will take to win on November 3, 2020.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight. I hope to hear from you!

\- Corky

clean_body: The response to our 72-hour “Money Bomb” has been incredible... and YOU can put us over the top! Peter, This is a quick follow-up to Corky’s message the other day. The response to our 72-hour “Money Bomb” has been incredible... and YOU can put us over the top! We split up our goal by ZIP code, and we’re now just $95 short for 18326. . Stand with Corky in this race to defeat Jeanne Shaheen, so he can stand up for freedom, free markets, secure borders, our military and veterans, our individual rights and the right to life. Our deadline is coming up fast at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT! | | From: Corky Messner To: All Supporters Subject: Let's turn New Hampshire "RED" in 2020! Peter, Does the number 2,736 ring a bell? We’ve mentioned it several times over the last few weeks. It’s the number of votes Hillary Clinton carried New Hampshire by in 2016. It was an incredibly narrow margin... and in 2020, we need to flip it. It’s vital that we turn New Hampshire “RED” next year, to help re-elect President Trump and DEFEAT liberal Jeanne Shaheen! That’s what we’re working to make happen every single day, and we can’t let up. Today, we’re launching an urgent 72-hour “Money Bomb” to raise $2,736 to close out October strong! With just over a year until Election Day, this race is heating up fast. The national Democrat campaign machine is desperate to re-elect Jeanne Shaheen... and we cannot allow them to fool voters! She DOES NOT represent our values, period. We must expose her record and radical views, and build the strong statewide grassroots team it will take to win on November 3, 2020. Thank you for standing with me in this fight. I hope to hear from you! \- Corky id:2019-10-14-16:30:24:605t | | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE |

body:
We only have until midnight to hit our October goal. It's an ambitious one, and that's because there's a lot we have to do between now and the Iowa caucuses. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528c40/45c30650/101b247e3/66f2ba3a/416745454/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

I love Halloween.

But before it gets to be time for costumes, candy, and trick-or-treating, I wanted to take a moment to talk about something else happening today: our monthly fundraising deadline.

We only have until midnight to hit our October goal. It's an ambitious one, and that's because there's a lot we have to do between now and the Iowa caucuses.

We have to grow this movement -- one grassroots donor and one volunteer at a time -- to keep on the path to victory. And together, I know we'll show the wealthy and well-connected that change is coming sooner than they think. We'll root out corruption in Washington and put power in the hands of working people -- where it belongs.

**And it all starts with the resources we raise before tonight's midnight deadline.**

[**I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Will you chip in $2 before midnight tonight to power the next few months of this campaign?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528c40/45c30650/101b247e3/66f2ba21/416745454/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LMktGX0VPTV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MTAzMV9WMVMxX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK2KF_EOM_GRM_E_20191031_V1S1_P_T2")

>
This campaign is based on the core principle that everyone gets equal access.

So during big fundraising pushes like this week's, you won't see me hosting swanky fundraisers with corporate executives and private equity vampires (now, that's scary).

Instead, I spent time this week with people in New Hampshire and South Carolina and chatted with them about their big dreams for the future -- and how we're going to work together to level the playing field for families everywhere.

Every day, I'm grateful to grassroots donors for making it possible to spend my time with people all across the country.

**We're going to keep building our movement this way -- the right way -- but it only works if everyone can pitch in. And right now, we're focused on this end-of-month fundraising deadline.**

[**Will you chip in for the first time before midnight tonight to own a piece of this grassroots movement?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528c40/45c30650/101b247e3/66f2ba21/416745454/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LMktGX0VPTV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MTAzMV9WMVMxX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK2KF_EOM_GRM_E_20191031_V1S1_P_T2")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

P.S. As a grandma, I'm no longer on costume duty -- at least, not for the kids. Every year that I get to see my grandchildren on Halloween, they give me a new assignment for their supporting cast. In the spirit of Halloween (and our end-of-month deadline), here is one of my trickiest costumes: Little Bo Peep (my granddaughter) and her Lost Sheep (me).

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528c40/45c30650/101b247e3/66f2ba21/416745454/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LMktGX0VPTV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MTAzMV9WMVMxX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK2KF_EOM_GRM_E_20191031_V1S1_P_T2")

body:

---
_**IMPEACHMENT RESOLUTION VOTE RESULTS**_
| Party| Yea| NAY
---|---|---
Radical Democrats| 231| 2
Republicans| 0| 194

_**DEAR NANCY AND DEMS: NO MORE BS! READ THE TRANSCRIPT!**_

Friend,

Democrats know that I've done nothing wrong but they are trying to take us down, that's why 231 Democrats voted to continue this Hoax and formalize the Impeachment Probe.

| This Impeachment nonsense is just a continuation of the Witch Hunt Hoax, which has been going on since before I even got elected. **They hate me, but most of all they hate YOU.**

**They hate the idea of you being in charge of our country. They want to ERASE your vote like it never existed, they want to ERASE your voice, and they want to ERASE your future.**

But I know they will fail because in America:
**THE PEOPLE RULE AGAIN!**
Today is the LAST DAY of the month, and with only 9 hours left before the deadline we're still CRITICALLY SHORT of our goal.

Previously a group of donors had agreed to triple-match all contributions, but with this Impeachment news I've authorized something we've never done before....
_**All donations made before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT will be instantly 5X-MATCHED.**_

Democrats are LITERALLY destroying California! | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53328342:sxlMvRwQN:m:1:2185358397:7783724D4C8BB980C9A08D626087CC4A:r)

Friend,

Democrats are LITERALLY destroying California!

Thanks to their complete mismanagement of our forests and their lack of oversight for public utility companies, California is burning once again.

And where it's not burning, millions of Californians are sitting in darkness due to massive power shutoffs.

And everywhere, gas prices continue to climb to record highs while our roads continue to deteriorate because the Democrats lied AGAIN and diverted that money to their other pet projects.

I'll say it again: **Democrats are LITERALLY destroying California!** And now they're trying to do the same thing to the rest of the country by staging a coup against our President and our democracy.

Radical leftist Congressman **Ted Lieu** is one of the failed Democrats who passed laws destroying our state when he was in the State Legislature, and now he's in Congress leading the charge to take down our President.

**I'm Brandon Fricke, and I'm running defeat Ted Lieu in California's 33rd Congressional District.**

[**_Want to stop the Democrats' California Demolition Derby?_ Then please help me take down Ted by donating $5, $25, $50 or even $100 or more before my month-end deadline tonight!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53328342:sxlMvRwQN:m:1:2185358397:7783724D4C8BB980C9A08D626087CC4A:r)

President Trump has made America great again. And we all know radical Democrats hate economic freedom and prosperity - _which is why they're trying to remove him from office._

Don't let radical California leftists Ted Lieu, Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff destroy America the way they are destroying California.

[**Please chip in $5, $50 or any amount you can before midnight tonight to help me defeat Ted Lieu, rescue California, and protect America from his radical agenda.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53328342:sxlMvRwQN:m:1:2185358397:7783724D4C8BB980C9A08D626087CC4A:r)

Thanks,

Brandon Fricke
Candidate for Congress
CA-33

body:
Peter,
**Our grassroots campaign is growing — and [we need your help](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11401702/116020543/-571370406?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWM3MWQ0YS0wOGZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hNtUAf2aUvz1lMvSpaN9qp5qBc9EWYAA2BPz16STyg=&emci=aa11a108-e4fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=85c71d4a-08fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&usp=sf_link). **
Following the success of my walk across New Hampshire, which brought both local and national media coverage and our bump up in a recent poll, we are looking for more volunteers — including those interested in being Delegates to the Democratic National Convention — to expand our capacity and allow us to build a winning campaign as we move into this next critical season.
**Please fill out our [Volunteer Sign-Up Form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11401703/116020544/-571370406?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWM3MWQ0YS0wOGZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hNtUAf2aUvz1lMvSpaN9qp5qBc9EWYAA2BPz16STyg=&emci=aa11a108-e4fb-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=85c71d4a-08fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&usp=sf_link) to let us know who you are and how you can help.**
Thank you so very much!
Warmly,
Joe

name: Matt Rains
subject: To a SUCCESSFUL October!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rains for Montana

* * *
Friend, Today closes out the month of October and an intense four weeks of campaigning across Montana. I’ve shared thoughts with incredible Montanans from the Marias Livestock Association, the NILE, NRA Rodeo Finals, and the Farmer’s Union Convention. I’ve been fortunate to spend time with fellow Democrats at the Lewis & Clark annual dinner, a Kalispell fashion show, Miles City Oktoberfest, UofM and MSU Homecomings, and the Billings Education Association. I’ve been part of Central Committee meetings or Meet & Greets with people from Augusta, Great Falls, Billings, Sidney, Anaconda, Whitefish, Bozeman, and many more towns along the way. A personal highlight this month was an inspirational meeting with Seth Moulton and am excited to join fellow veterans in Congress working across party lines for the good of the country.

[I’m ready to serve the great state of Montana in Congress. I’m going to need your help to take my campaign to the next level. Can you chip in to support my campaign today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11402704/116034410/-971702669?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWE4ZTgzYi0wYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_MVC2XCCKbtxmE2UOaeQ99NFYE6ny84ivnVr_0jk-0=&refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190929-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=25) | | | | [$5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11402706/116034412/-971702669?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWE4ZTgzYi0wYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_MVC2XCCKbtxmE2UOaeQ99NFYE6ny84ivnVr_0jk-0=&refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190929-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=5)

My message has grown along the campaign trail. Having grown up in Simms, a Montana small town, and attended Montana public schools, I’m frustrated in the way rural Montana is talked about in the past tense. I will reverse the small town narrative and bring prosperity back into the heart and soul of our great state. I will fight for rural Montana. Our schools should not be dropping down from Class A to Class B. Class B to Class C. We should be a state of growth and expansion. Our ranchers and farmers which are the foundation of rural Montana must not be ignored in Congress any longer.

I am Matt Rains. I am a born and raised Montanan. My background is Montana Agriculture, Military, Energy, Humanities, and Arts. I am a West Point graduate and Iraq War veteran. I traveled over 60 countries documenting the best of humanity and the darkest of a modern-day genocide. I was a power plant engineer inspecting coal and gas plants across the country. Most importantly, now I am the fourth generation to run my family’s Birdtail Ranch in Simms.

I have a strong, fair, and dedicated voice that can represent the majority of my fellow Montanans.

I ask three things from every Montana:
1. Check-out and research my campaign. [www.rainsformontana.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11402718/116034430/1776779849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWE4ZTgzYi0wYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_MVC2XCCKbtxmE2UOaeQ99NFYE6ny84ivnVr_0jk-0=&emci=7a583a0a-08fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1aa8e83b-0afc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8326059)
2. Contact me to ask questions and learn more. [matt@rainsformontana.com](mailto:matt@rainsformontana.com)
3. Donate if possible. I know rural Montana does not have extra to spend on candidates. You are the individuals I am fighting to represent in Congress. If you can’t donate, I understand.

Matt Rains is a Democrat running for Congress to be a strong, independent voice for Montana. Matt is a 5th generation Montana rancher, a West Point graduate, and a Blackhawk helicopter pilot who served in Iraq. Matt will bring his Montana cowboy qualities to Washington to fight for affordable health care, better education, and to protect our public lands.

Matt is running to represent hardworking Montanans, not DC lobbyists and wealthy corporations. That means he's relying on your grassroots support. name: Jess B., National Finance Director
subject: FWD: making goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hi, team. Michael asked me to reach out for your help to reach our fundraising goal. The deadline is midnight TONIGHT. And since this is a crucial end-of-month deadline, we're refreshing our ActBlue account every few minutes to see if we'll make it.

Right now, I'm getting a bit nervous. Donations have slowed down, but if you make your first donation now, it could get us over the top.

Use this link to donate and stand with Michael before midnight:

subject: I’m dropping out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio
body:
Trust me, this was the last thing I wanted to do.Trust me, this was the last thing I wanted to do. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_s=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_t=wGWSlTsH9KQF0rNjAaj531p4CxRI4vlpm8pB8zXugQfmuYnUTdGO7VByMVFHA2XzJ5aB8GRHR5fb1n990ion96ruG3I08mWLpjMRk_Ic7IqPLvCyHhSlCkaYdo8_Z7l336F5yH-EroZPZnA3TMIJm0n2yf_DbFRbckVgDK9N-jk%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_e=61Kp79DuQMfhW16TrlMV8hjxE_lbHLcV8DhvcrscmBMq1v8ZA9kDNTpvHgBVYf0b8akWxKo1aqhQ3BjeQI9OMyZLx7kpaWxAGTZ3Ho4MVgu89UBv6wcO7lFYuO1y3Coxp0Gthks3NuSMTf1hru4T8hTqcV16CI1BhxfUGlz497ze87CsjiJSAWMmOBl4ZeNOiqfVwtXo0Q_J7yySUkV9naUsY4u99yGhTvcovcrxdDm17hBNL-EJHoWcpNZWjnI_S_G2jY29mQdsyu_J1K8VtLUcfdMPgueWzn6W8UaFsWHj1Lb-dcErgEy6V9lw7zSrnCzFvkBNrfPfDUJBcIRN-1B6f2iRGxiz3QWMGGIZWpM3O-GNQJrruuuvwKU17kAIAMt-C4owXJH-WSRhk3LtZg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

At midnight I’m facing my critical October fundraising deadline and if I don’t get **100 grassroots conservatives** to step up right now – I’m going to have to drop out of this race.

**[Please, join my America First campaign and consider chipping in $25, $50, $100, or even more right now and help me stay in this fight!](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_e=61Kp79DuQMfhW16TrlMV8hjxE_lbHLcV8DhvcrscmBMq1v8ZA9kDNTpvHgBVYf0b8akWxKo1aqhQ3BjeQI9OMyZLx7kpaWxAGTZ3Ho4MVgu89UBv6wcO7lFYuO1y3Coxp0Gthks3NuSMTf1hru4T8hTqcV16CI1BhxfUGlz497xcGUeftkDWPw-6_ZOJnWXeN-7wh98wVghGwBDgDYPFEu6SMRyMgFKUdC7iAFWj92yjGORrul4Q9uK9pb5Aiaoz3eltjmIhOupCR1ufBI5w1-LBVsqtBHbTqFsLVJMzI9X7Ms9tngHyUoAyF0RhS1EnzQ7aFZ2A9A_y6Vu9dGG3k9X1N0tLvwMD2B2-ZD1JHaP0ohEcsDsdaSPTiEOSuwYCOZ9AZ8vwi25ACu0sVfd3EA%3D%3D)**
| [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE
Help Joe Now »**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_e=61Kp79DuQMfhW16TrlMV8hjxE_lbHLcV8DhvcrscmBMq1v8ZA9kDNTpvHgBVYf0b8akWxKo1aqhQ3BjeQI9OMyZLx7kpaWxAGTZ3Ho4MVgu89UBv6wcO7lFYuO1y3Coxp0Gthks3NuSMTf1hru4T8hTqcV16CI1BhxfUGlz497xCMIDjNCF8ogwTiUgcGhsGvAUbe235uVwW9DkdZ0d6EGEU_Na9ltmH_vjB390B7sFQoUyEEgxdYotbMFwHtKrxCa0aTzyVskAXXSp1OUrDXdhA8s795Np-Qc4WmjTlD-JkIgj981BlaK9lNBfuUi5SafDFZ4LuBkARCZFssCh6x4Q78g8mvc4xajal9svjEuhD2666nHUTshyjJLrFL5k4xwaiR7bvvXr-GiCNy98q0w%3D%3D)
---

Since day one of announcing my re-election campaign for Sheriff, Democrats and Establishment Republicans have made it clear how they feel about me – _racist, bully, criminal_ – **all false, hateful rhetoric.**

You see, I’ve been around the block a time or two so I’ve seen this all before. The Left knows my message is sticking with voters so they’re dead set on smearing my name to help them win.

**[With your support before midnight,](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_e=61Kp79DuQMfhW16TrlMV8hjxE_lbHLcV8DhvcrscmBMq1v8ZA9kDNTpvHgBVYf0b8akWxKo1aqhQ3BjeQI9OMyZLx7kpaWxAGTZ3Ho4MVgu89UBv6wcO7lFYuO1y3Coxp0Gthks3NuSMTf1hru4T8hTqcV16CI1BhxfUGlz497z_9ZsiOAm4tp7NaVgtQq8q_WB9EIaHzanF-VTYror3RgVaktMYLb-7OcEIJ6d9q7pz4V6xIwXDb_M9Gvoirn4Zr0q07y5agl76qNtbhR6OzWDdERUvmPAnHhXMLjw2ORgNnbqcx7l47bMnRIgXSZpQQng4_oYXu7kXFM3Rc3nNrrjX_79hMA-hRQZi9dq_AcyHL4TLt_bBHy-tdOamQ_l2DMLelndG5aZDEFuQ0QTyUg%3D%3D)** their tactics won’t work. I’m ready to put violent criminals back in pink jumpsuits, secure our borders, and keep our children safe.

But this is a team effort and **[I’m counting on you to help me before midnight.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_e=61Kp79DuQMfhW16TrlMV8hjxE_lbHLcV8DhvcrscmBMq1v8ZA9kDNTpvHgBVYf0b8akWxKo1aqhQ3BjeQI9OMyZLx7kpaWxAGTZ3Ho4MVgu89UBv6wcO7lFYuO1y3Coxp0Gthks3NuSMTf1hru4T8hTqcV16CI1BhxfUGlz497z4sPjzEL3dLwECmlb8PVR3BNj84Rd-7xWs8E8D4mCTo16no_2eDQb-RLXpY-W6C1MBn174s4mQsTa3PKj6Ju5bVsnn6vQo75pfBg5t04M0xmItY-LDWhSbVbXhDcnfvaqmEaz66ipbuYcAbeROLJD8i2waXwrTs6mP1EFF9cVVRSzx0DbM2o-f5itZuRVHGQSuVLts-NyZF8wU6Ta86fyDk_Mp7YlS6sOnFoU_qmAOMQ%3D%3D)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio
[**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE
Help Joe Now »**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=8c5df1196f854dcfacc2ab269c5efa1c&_e=61Kp79DuQMfhW16TrlMV8hjxE_lbHLcV8DhvcrscmBMq1v8ZA9kDNTpvHgBVYf0b8akWxKo1aqhQ3BjeQI9OMyZLx7kpaWxAGTZ3Ho4MVgu89UBv6wcO7lFYuO1y3Coxp0Gthks3NuSMTf1hru4T8hTqcV16CI1BhxfUGlz497w0OKzEo72f5w7lR4_E4eh8GidRFvO5NZALeaUhXMTviI5VATLCJekBFCCLWmNYnAvxWypZpf5pb4TXTi8fW-Eh9QrH0_bqEdi7JbIqtzaHtPARashNHxqeE2KWCLu0uegnoneF-uO-E3d2T2O4Pj1LTM-P1OmnmhNZ7W0fbjFnOGsC7MGbt8Up58LoSmf3V55Y_yM_wBPxIicslNEG3NoAoJsyRYmK9eIiK59QQ0-NLw%3D%3D)

name: Margaret Good
subject: Friend
body:
Hi friend,

The urgency is real -- that's why we are writing.

Florida's 16th Congressional District represents the pathway to Florida’s future. Every day we are proving that you can build a winning movement that’s by the people and for the people. The problem is that for over a decade our opponent, Vern Buchanan, has championed policies that destroy our environment, deny families health care, and leave behind working Americans. We need to get him out of Congress.

To do that, we are building another winning campaign, but we can’t do it without you. Contributing now will help us fund our program to register voters, help us get a campaign office, and produce digital ads. We are working hard but we need your help to win.

Can you make a contribution today of 25? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.31_b1_mg_all&amount=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto]

We need all the help we can get! Will you forward this email to one friend or family member and ask that person to contribute to our winning campaign?

Thank you! We can’t do it without you!
Margaret

Support Margaret » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.31_b1_mg_all&amount=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto]

If you wish to receive fewer emails, please click here. Margaret Good for Congress

Sarasota , FL 34277

body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Well, we're here... The last day of October, the spookiest fundraising deadline of the year. I wanted to send you a quick update on our goal progress. **The scariest thing you 'll see today is this: We're still $75,882 short of hitting our $725,000 goal -- and we need to get there by midnight tonight if we want to stay competitive.** **[So I'm asking, can you chip in right now to make sure our organizers have the resources we need to keep building a campaign that can compete and win?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191031_CB_20191031-fr-CB-halloween-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I know it may seem like a lot to raise in a short amount of time, but each time we've set a big goal, this team has risen to the challenge -- and I know this one will be no different. **Make a fun-size donation today:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Yes, it makes all of our jobs harder, but I strongly feel that it's the right thing to do. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: The Pelosi Democrats’ DISGRACEFUL vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
The witch hunt continues... and they’re shredding due process. Read more >>
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=782d3e6828716a6088e6939c640d4a07f18a81ac60dceb7cc886b1bd460c7bb490d5f88604aaf08ec0b18669d85b48bb33b9f845fd1b8e5f)
---
| | | Peter,

Today, the Pelosi Democrats voted to move forward their impeachment witch hunt.

They are DESPERATE to undo the result of the 2016 election... **resorting to an attempted COUP against President Trump!**

We must stand and fight against this hyper-partisan sham.

**[Help me call out the Pelosi Democrats and support President Trump with a $5, $10, $25, or $50 emergency contribution!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=782d3e6828716a602ffd5778adf5aba91a915bd884d07e5e1c05627632539d35cf71823080e1c3ec220fca7f75667239ba2e68a1dd564cd8 "Help me call out the Pelosi Democrats and support President Trump with a $5, $10, $25, or $50 emergency contribution!")**

These radicals want to destroy President Trump, because he's willing to stand up to their politically correct, radical-left war on America's values. If I were in the U.S. Senate, I'd fight with all I have against this scheme. But you can bet that Doug Jones won't.

It's more important than ever that we win on Election Day 2020. It's time to stand up to the coastal elites, and fight for our traditional American values.

**[Rush your support to help us call out this sham and win this critical 2020 race](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=782d3e6828716a600d32a89c3799c1612d8903e49498ef30adedb1d17e8f93025a016c3d52c611c2f5fb5e9064387d3fa48ab85e524aff74 "Rush your support to help us call out this sham and win this critical 2020 race")**.

\- Coach

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. | We weren't expecting to be scared until tonight for Halloween, but we checked on our progress this morning for Ed Markey's October goal, and we're coming up $12,000 short.

_**[Can Ed count on you to pitch in before midnight and help us close the gap?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-103119_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
