name: Dr. Lerah Lee
subject: ER doctor, Home Depot Exec and a professional politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
I'm a teacher and a mother of five; how can I compete against millionaires who can self-fund their entire campaigns?I'm a teacher and a mother of five; how can I compete against millionaires who can self-fund their entire campaigns? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_t=MnMI22fH1OBI_EHQp-OsPu2tc7SZDbEGxBA29S5ndtjBFNoKnpxj6qM9UVSn9LisxejfHYfCqAw-0z3qa8GCYkpNhniaP6-W_zaBdD0yV6fThzmztvEc6y5pRQzH4mM35LZ4MJVlSMqwh2AUrSyTmK80-Up37JJTy5X6n6y0kEk%3D)
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mCOW13UYDZyI8AxygeQotKc4VHSev9MyIlAUXku-dJFJ5Whz3RY7sqw_8IuJQTdCguByI6wXZXmYbenz_tSxDMwCEPbB48X_baj8mexDCH5GA6uQVBg31q5RB-XFlzXgqVTxK_fDiUbNzNwBQ8sT0fMcpDTfzdTAvOCrEXWfsvskjn3sXTlX1Xxf8BQUpKTPiKi2r9Zes_4nh-K0pfS06BcSm-nyN7zms9eDaY5KBRrG)
Friend,

As we approach the end of October, I wanted to quickly say THANK YOU for all of the support that you’ve shown me so far in my campaign to become the second-ever black female Republican member of the U.S House!

Campaigning for Congress is a 7 day a week job. With the primary election just a little over five months away, **I’m working as if every day were election day.**
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mCOW13UYDZyI8AxygeQotKfPJxzNUG9rA-DUcLHu6m-zBZdTtqgj8SAVzDMBX0a6YKqQiAZfSY9TlzrCHEH5Ue-NYosyF1EphRQP-nWqcXLUrQYHMy15j4NEO1t82KBoJ4exXCsHyAqoHmEgaUIChgD4Ain9XReTqv0e53HHiZQDF4ot6DzWYHTtxZTdOio8w5FgomHr7UySCs8Dmfa3cZRGvF6eutcvy4hHZCVWJyV5)
The stakes in my race are high, Friend. The biggest newspaper in Atlanta is even calling the race **_“among the most competitive in the country.”_** Last year, the race between the Republican incumbent and his Democrat challenger **was decided by less than $500 votes.**

**No one can really prepare you for the sticker shock** when you learn how much it costs to run a congressional campaign – I’m still trying to understand why these endeavors cost so much, but they do and in a district directly outside of metropolis like Atlanta – campaign costs rise precipitously.

I’ve set a goal of raising $100,000 in the month of October – and with a little less than 12 hours left to go, I’m still $10,000 short. **[Are you able to chip-in $100, $50, $25 or $10 today to help me make sure I meet my goal?](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mCOW13UYDZyI8AxygeQotKf3lc2hVOFWhRaSQU_5FJ-uILKqrQCiYvOPeNYKc9J6Osc9j1jcvdRwlxIM1v2riVt-WiejkIbA10saYHfiQzS0NjloUMlSBuM_AX3thCqqciEn4MsE1lWApLERx2OCDMfe58l0gcu1NF1R9pViyyWLj1IaXYwUjmlKHjIi3ac6tlm3vlOE9uCwP3IxJxDJf_F07Ryo8UuVcHcN9QvwQgrv)**
**[<< Contribute $100 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mJ0MV9EGQoM3nnE1Mvv66U6GxjjAFiJFFZiVkmCwkcXYH8x9C1ayDcIyc1wvkbu7Gq-_3vnmi8goyo4I0GP-jQI4iiNnINP6ZPUY-yVCBt4iiS43HqSzuCPlmK7dkPzfR-yrnuI8G_8eVCINJ42SJ7rulGuwxQbheMDEH4bIM9yEC3vRI1gtolVb7cTxqlVyRS-7B0XK5gyUdLe8_BvFDYm4BHnPq59JQQoxlS1ET85t)**
**[<< Contribute $50 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mOsqAL2OMgedsEMZ3COcFZUmng2DV1nMHSMJHSwop8AoBRHIdcIHBtB6OO2-1glvK97ME5txhI8OlUmdI_c1IEANQ7kPSsEmUVI5KOwEq2dCyRanVN4PEfDnH4xazryoJSaId0uQlJa0fkK5IaTVx3I3JAJe93JJqggwMq1AfEJKifLDFXV8N6oI6KW4HDtzbIb8O1qmd_XSXU5u_HKL2Yh0GiRyUgcL6PoJ-9hMt1pk)**
**[<< Contribute $25 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mFpfpxsNt0njs6N_6PCQ0UVuH4_GrAvjSJJY2FBShR_e4jTibgZIcIAcU7QuOTHWIDmofIy9kZWDTJ85ow7N3aAHAVIDyt20lfHxOwTZHbZL_K5NItHy7oH5cmKgMNTQ8TejNDy16XHZIWw9mBbS27dEk3JhH3oKPzGlc4NWFGg1fnd0QdlMcrwIpyC9RsYm35XY6y8SITimamF1SzKFM3ObqIWni_mg03raSV4A6Zk1)**
**[<< Contribute $10 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mC6iaWx66ug4BrcxPaKEFxy43UUr7iUj0hOY7vc_YYx-VF7eVHZ0r4h-htITSmW9AjK1rMUTS5e5r_sr76XW21joCLE5MS_zY0wilOhpIqM8EcxfNMDH_wJS7fzFIfRnt0qMR-ahNItGmT_jKBL80Ue3KPPfvysW26uSG2bN3xDbhJZG_BTtTDEqMfvzkMZMcenUPSdUkA84rHrnDj4Dltpf3qqgr1nMPVsC6HobUNxX)**
And unlike the wealthy, politically connected Republicans I’m running against – I’m unable to self-fund.

**Here’s what I’m up against:**
1. A former Home Depot executive who loaned her campaign $250,000
2. An emergency room doctor who gave his campaign $301,000
3. A career politician who loaned her campaign more than $600,000

**I’m a teacher, mother of five and first-time candidate** ; I’ve never had the luxury of making friends out of liquor titans or lobbyists who can bundle hundreds of thousands of dollars to my campaign – which is why I have to ask for financial help from trusted grassroots conservatives like you, Friend.

Blessings always,

Dr. Lerah lee
Conservative for U.S. House

| [**Contribute >>**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a4739e366ca14687bc5ecb28eb4e4506&_e=jzY3QwLjRgMg8-_wrXqyB5bd120WXKXf-v6gfrhXxEj5LTf7Tqs7c-BPRAxFh_gvT8grDZBJL3KblVuutNo7mCOW13UYDZyI8AxygeQotKetUBt6BTGymBNPx6BuhPa2La-SFYEFDVVRqYvcDKky2D2WeCSGgv5GDfktEXPDR8zpwNIlrwkK393JMCKXE-O0UxIiup9h4sxpqYrHOhRVjNGghakppltngxk0XGBfgKRx1D95vNXKdYeTZgWWbMb2-mkf-lLhJcQ0PrrNh17-v0_L-gpw1SJmGz0degRs1NaGz4zLr59uWgRgJBjcWHDI)
---

| Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
---

A career politician who loaned her campaign more than $600,000 I’m a teacher, mother of five and first-time candidate ; I’ve never had the luxury of making friends out of liquor titans or lobbyists who can bundle hundreds of thousands of dollars to my campaign – which is why I have to ask for financial help from trusted grassroots conservatives like you, Friend. Blessings always, Dr. Lerah lee Conservative for U.S. House | | Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress

#
Peter,

**We’re up against Washington Democrats who are determined to IMPEACH President Trump and undo our positive results. **

We’re up against radical donors prepared to spend MILLIONS to defeat me and win BOTH of Georgia’s Senate seats.

We’re up against the national liberal media, because the next Democrat debate – **_hosted by MSNBC and Rachel Maddow_** – is coming to Georgia.

We’re also up against the clock. [**Our first deadline since the end of the last fundraising quarter is at 11:59 PM TONIGHT, and we’re still falling short of our goal.** **Can you rush an emergency donation right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=dc06c9c40f&e=02cd889ad3)

| Next month, a wave of liberal politicians who want to bring socialism to the White House and Senate are coming to Georgia. The national liberal media – led by MSNBC – is coming with them.

**All eyes will be on Georgia, and I can’t think of a better way to welcome them than standing with President Trump, defending the Senate majority, and crushing this October fundraising goal. **

We haven’t fallen short of a single fundraising goal this year, thanks to supporters like you. [**I’m asking you to stand with us again, right now, before 11:59 PM tonight. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5921abddbd&e=02cd889ad3)

If we hit this goal, we can enter a critical month with strong momentum, but we’re counting on you to help us get there.

[**Please, pitch in whatever you can afford BEFORE 11:59 PM tonight! **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c4700eb10e&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David Perdue.

Peter,

With this campaign, I want to hit the ground running and set my agenda first thing.

Whether it’s lowering taxes and cutting back wasteful spending, creating jobs and growing our economy, or repealing and replacing Obamacare, our mission begins now.

I know there are A LOT of important battles ahead so I want to hear from you as soon as possible on this. Where do you stand? What are your top priorities?

name: Tulsi Gabbard
subject: Got time to talk?
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11404933/116054398/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg0YTZkYy0xM2ZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLS82a_IHBaDhJ9pi5SfLrMveuVgJYmJHCHMuM_O2zc=&emci=b63f9c9a-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=fa84a6dc-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| **I’m writing to ask for your help before midnight tonight, friend.** I’m ready to serve as our country’s next Commander in Chief, to usher in a new era of peace and prosperity for all. I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support my campaign, and I’d like to hear what’s on your mind. **Donate any amount now — as little as $1 — to join my November call list. I hope to speak with you soon.** [DONATE $12](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11404942/116054408/1238925248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg0YTZkYy0xM2ZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLS82a_IHBaDhJ9pi5SfLrMveuVgJYmJHCHMuM_O2zc=&refcode=em191031_1_cta&amount=12&refcode2=fa84a6dc-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) Friend — **The despicable attacks on our campaign this month serve as a reminder of not just what we’re up against, but why I decided to run in the first place:** We, the People need a leader in the White House. The establishment elite — from Hillary Clinton to her friends and proxies in the corporate media — do not serve us. They serve themselves and their friends in the DC elite; they’re the keepers of the status quo. **I — we — scare them because they know they can’t control us. We cannot be “groomed” by them, by Russia, by anyone.** I am running to give the Democratic Party back to the people, to stop engaging in regime change wars and work to end the new Cold War and nuclear arms race for which we have all paid a steep price. I’m running to defend the rights of EVERY American: Our freedoms as guaranteed by the Constitution, the clean air and clean water we need to live, our right to healthcare, education and opportunity. After the month we’ve had, **I’m more grateful than ever for the strength, the fight and the support of this campaign we are running together.** At the end of last month, I put aside a couple of hours to check-in with the people who make our movement great. I asked many of them about their greatest source of frustration and their greatest hope for the future. Resoundingly, I heard that people are frustrated with an establishment elite in both parties — and their greatest hope is that we can overturn this status quo by electing leaders who put service above self and people before profits. [**I’m taking an hour and a half out of my schedule to call and thank as many supporters as I can get to on the list of people who donate to this email, before the end of the month. Will you be one of them, friend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11404947/116054418/251539436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg0YTZkYy0xM2ZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLS82a_IHBaDhJ9pi5SfLrMveuVgJYmJHCHMuM_O2zc=&refcode=em191031_1_ask&refcode2=fa84a6dc-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11404982/116054474/1238925248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg0YTZkYy0xM2ZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLS82a_IHBaDhJ9pi5SfLrMveuVgJYmJHCHMuM_O2zc=&refcode=em191031_1_button&amount=25&refcode2=fa84a6dc-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) I’ve promised you this before and I will promise it again: I will never choose what’s popular, easy or politically expedient over doing what is right. I’ll never lie to you and I’ll never mislead you. I will always say what I mean and mean what I say. I’m the first female combat veteran to run for president and I’m undaunted by the fight ahead. From speaking out loudly against the military industrial complex and foreign policy establishment, against partisan attacks that only serve to divide us, against the Clinton elite and its allies in the corporate media, against the chickenhawks in leadership who are bringing us closer to war with Iran and nuclear war with Russia and China. This is our fight to win, friend, and I’m so glad to have you by my side. Forever for the people,
Tulsi Gabbard PS —
I made a decision back in 2015 to not accept PAC or corporate money for my campaign. Vested self interest wielded by the rich and powerful few is a big part of what we are fighting to change, and that’s why our campaign is 100% powered by the grassroots and small donations from many people. [**Will you chip in now and join the fight? Click here to make a donation and join the list of people I will be calling in the coming days.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11404986/116054478/251539436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg0YTZkYy0xM2ZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLS82a_IHBaDhJ9pi5SfLrMveuVgJYmJHCHMuM_O2zc=&refcode=em191031_1_footer&refcode2=fa84a6dc-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) [View this message in your browser to share](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11404990/116054482/185833452?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg0YTZkYy0xM2ZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DLS82a_IHBaDhJ9pi5SfLrMveuVgJYmJHCHMuM_O2zc=&emci=b63f9c9a-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=fa84a6dc-13fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&sourceid=1014165&ms=em191031_1&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191031_1)

clean_body: | | | | I’m writing to ask for your help before midnight tonight, friend. I’m ready to serve as our country’s next Commander in Chief, to usher in a new era of peace and prosperity for all. I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support my campaign, and I’d like to hear what’s on your mind. Donate any amount now — as little as $1 — to join my November call list. I hope to speak with you soon. Friend — The despicable attacks on our campaign this month serve as a reminder of not just what we’re up against, but why I decided to run in the first place: We, the People need a leader in the White House. The establishment elite — from Hillary Clinton to her friends and proxies in the corporate media — do not serve us. They serve themselves and their friends in the DC elite; they’re the keepers of the status quo. I — we — scare them because they know they can’t control us. We cannot be “groomed” by them, by Russia, by anyone. I am running to give the Democratic Party back to the people, to stop engaging in regime change wars and work to end the new Cold War and nuclear arms race for which we have all paid a steep price. I’m running to defend the rights of EVERY American: Our freedoms as guaranteed by the Constitution, the clean air and clean water we need to live, our right to healthcare, education and opportunity. After the month we’ve had, I’m more grateful than ever for the strength, the fight and the support of this campaign we are running together. At the end of last month, I put aside a couple of hours to check-in with the people who make our movement great. I asked many of them about their greatest source of frustration and their greatest hope for the future. Resoundingly, I heard that people are frustrated with an establishment elite in both parties — and their greatest hope is that we can overturn this status quo by electing leaders who put service above self and people before profits. I’ve promised you this before and I will promise it again: I will never choose what’s popular, easy or politically expedient over doing what is right. I’ll never lie to you and I’ll never mislead you. I will always say what I mean and mean what I say. I’m the first female combat veteran to run for president and I’m undaunted by the fight ahead. From speaking out loudly against the military industrial complex and foreign policy establishment, against partisan attacks that only serve to divide us, against the Clinton elite and its allies in the corporate media, against the chickenhawks in leadership who are bringing us closer to war with Iran and nuclear war with Russia and China. This is our fight to win, friend, and I’m so glad to have you by my side. Forever for the people, Tulsi Gabbard PS — I made a decision back in 2015 to not accept PAC or corporate money for my campaign. Vested self interest wielded by the rich and powerful few is a big part of what we are fighting to change, and that’s why our campaign is 100% powered by the grassroots and small donations from many people. | | PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW PO Box 75255 Kapolei HI 96707 The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you. It is one way we come together as a community of progressives to make change in this world. If you would like to receive less emails like this one, you can . Should you want to unsubscribe—and we would hate to see you leave—. Finally, if you believe we need to end the culture of corruption and greed in Washington, . name: Sara Gideon
subject: Let me explain
body:
Tonight at midnight...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd3/4bef7a87/6b0adcfa/287fc4b9/268912974/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request - especially today - is so important.
Tonight at midnight, we're closing the books on October, and we still haven't hit our fundraising goal yet. That's a big deal because hitting our monthly fundraising goals is how we stay on track to report a really great number when our FEC report goes public at the end of this quarter.
I'll be honest, all eyes are on us. The press is watching, and so is the national Republican establishment. They know Susan Collins is vulnerable, and they're looking to see whether our campaign has what it takes to finally beat her.
The answer is _yes_ , we do. But in order to prove it, we need to hit our October fundraising goal. That's why I have to ask:
[**Make a $3 contribution before midnight so we can hit our October fundraising goal. Every individual donation brings us one step closer to winning this race.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd3/4bef7a87/6b0adcfa/287fc4b8/268912974/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191031-1-full")
I am so proud not just of all we've accomplished these past few months, but because of the way we've chosen to run our campaign. Our commitment to fund our work through grassroots donations might make our jobs a little harder, but it's more than worth it.
All my best
_Sara_
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd3/4bef7a87/6b0adcfa/287fc4b8/268912974/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191031-1-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd3/4bef7a87/6b0adcfa/287fc4bf/268912974/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd3/4bef7a87/6b0adcfa/287fc4be/268912974/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

clean_body: If Democrats in Congress have shown you anything over the past month or two, it’s that they will NEVER change. As far as the leftists are concerned, If Democrats in Congress have shown you anything over the past month or two, it’s that they will NEVER change. As far as the leftists are concerned, there are NO Americans struggling to afford their medications, there are ZERO families in border towns fearing for their safety... Nope – there’s just President Trump, who, according to them, needs to be impeached as soon as humanly possible. But friend, while the Democrats wear blinders to the truth, you and I are coming together to GET THE JOB DONE and stand with our President. Earlier this month, as our President came right here to Texas, he asked me to reach out to each and every voter in our great state and show him their support. And friend, Texas responded. President Trump was extremely impressed by the number of Texans that added their name to his list. I received a phone call thanking the good people of Texas for having his back... but the President also asked for the names of MORE supporters. That’s why I’m adding every single Texan who chips in to my END OF MONTH FUND to the list of patriots who have Trump’s back. ** Friend, President Trump is giving a voice to Americans who have been ignored by Washington for years. He’s fighting to make sure that people like you and me don’t have to watch our conservative values be replaced by the radical left. So if you can’t stomach the thought of deep-blue, RADICAL Texas, I need you to If you aren’t on board with astronomically high taxes and the Green New Deal, I need you to If you are ready to defend our President from the unfair and politically-motivated impeachment sham, I need you to President Trump needs to know that we’re on his side. He needs to know that we’ll stand with him in the darkest hour. He needs to know we’re willing to stand up and make our voices heard. ** – Senator John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.

subject: Trump is destroying the environment, and no one is paying attention

body:
|

| | Hello Peter, American media and talking points have been so consumed by impeachment and Trump's bombastic defense of himself that we are ignoring all the other sinister things he's been doing as president. Trump announced that he was undoing a nearly two decades-long regulation that limits logging in the Tongass National Forest in Alaska \-- one of the most pristine regions of untouched nature in America, filled with salmon creeks, fjords, and glaciers stretching from mountaintops down to the icy waters surrounding Juneau. This is just the latest in a string of environmental regulations unravelled and shredded by Trump and his pro-massive corporation, anti-science, climate change-denying EPA. We need to hear what engaged voters think about this issue: **Are you worried about the environment with Trump in office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc49/6e9863e8/15e9aaa5/1db085bf/3118125550/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/gjI0a1J-x") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc49/6e9863e8/15e9aaa5/1db085bf/3118125550/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/gjI0a1J-x") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc49/6e9863e8/15e9aaa5/1db085be/3118125550/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191031a.ND-b&refcode2=lXxay0wa3C4gats762NU")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Adam Schiff’s Drive to Impeach Trump Based on Opinions, Deception and Illusions – Not Facts
body:
"Rep. Adam Schiff is a poor man’s Harry Houdini." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=961a919286&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Adam Schiff’s Drive to Impeach Trump Based on Opinions, Deception and Illusions – Not Facts**

“Rep. Adam Schiff is a poor man’s Harry Houdini. He is a cheap illusionist performing amateurish parlor tricks of deception in his quest to convince his audience that he possesses damning evidence of an impeachable offense committed by President Trump,” Gregg Jarrett writes in Fox News.

“Schiff, D-Calif., has no such evidence, of course. But like most illusionists, Schiff employs misdirection and confusion. He attempts to convince you that _opinions_ are evidence, while _facts_ are not.”

The bottom line: “Anyone with computer access can download and read the transcript while forming their own opinion.” In fact, [you can read it for yourself here](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bef30bc9fd&e=3ee4985eea).

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa3b92ddfe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The decision of Reddit administrators to “quarantine” one of President Trump’s largest and most vocal groups of supporters online is an “egregious example of social media sites meddling in political affairs,” Rep. Jim Banks (R-IN) writes for _**[RealClearPolitics](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b6206f291&e=3ee4985eea).**_

“Republicans need to start speaking out about the treatment we’ve received from technology companies. We need to understand that nobody else will stand up for us.”
---
|
---
| “The White House is making a strong push against Democrats’ ‘Medicare for All’ proposal, laying out a ‘Health Care for You’ agenda to boost competition and transparency, lower prescription prices, and produce greater affordability in health-related costs,” Fred Lucas reports in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5e7b6a1dc&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The nation’s deadly opioid epidemic shows signs of ebbing as the Trump administration Oct. 30 reported a 5.1% drop in overdose deaths, with sharper declines in some of the most hard-hit states,” Shira Stein reports for [_Bloomberg Law_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6155962a8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “You have to give the Democrats credit. When their narratives collapse, they invent a new one. Their misrepresentation of the phone conversation and the president’s inquiry into Ukrainian corruption and potential influence in our 2016 election are somehow being conflated into a most amorphous allegation of ‘abuse of power,’” Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in [_**The Washington Times**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb68eb3481&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: Climate Change: A Chance to Take Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CVO1ySznNTPko1ADWLcg4BtoS5mNJKYc_VbX3LfYtMw=/2nROrIINvFJN9jP48loxCYCczb-xAwkGirhkHUT3_SA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191031-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)

---
Peter,

Climate change is one of the most critical threats facing both our country and our world. Not only is it an environmental issue, but it is also a serious threat to our national security.

Earlier this year, Abigail voted to pass the Climate Action Now Act - a bill that she helped introduce. The bill would require the administration to remain in the Paris Climate Accord AND push the administration to develop an evidence-based plan for how our country can best reduce emission levels in cooperation with the agreement.

But this bill is sitting in the Senate. [**Can you take a moment and sign our petition calling on the Senate to pass the Climate Action Now Act?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CVO1ySznNTPko1ADWLcg4BtoS5mNJKYc_VbX3LfYtMw=/iqvMFDDmaU-aiI7sKJH1ibpLa2cAWJFoOcgYb0dbMEI=) | | | [ SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.myngp.com/el/CVO1ySznNTPko1ADWLcg4BtoS5mNJKYc_VbX3LfYtMw=/iqvMFDDmaU-aiI7sKJH1ibpLa2cAWJFoOcgYb0dbMEI=)
---
We're already feeling the impacts of climate change. From devastating floods to higher temperatures to species extinction to mass migration due to famine: the impacts of climate change cannot be ignored.

[**Please, Peter, can you take a moment now and stand with Abigail to support this important legislation?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CVO1ySznNTPko1ADWLcg4BtoS5mNJKYc_VbX3LfYtMw=/iqvMFDDmaU-aiI7sKJH1ibpLa2cAWJFoOcgYb0dbMEI=)
| | [ SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.myngp.com/el/CVO1ySznNTPko1ADWLcg4BtoS5mNJKYc_VbX3LfYtMw=/iqvMFDDmaU-aiI7sKJH1ibpLa2cAWJFoOcgYb0dbMEI=)
---
Thank you,

_-Bettina Weiss_

name: Tim Kaine
subject: What will VA look like in a decade?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm not sure I know the answer, but here's something I do know: what we do in 2019 and 2020 will determine Virginia's future for the next decade, if not longer.
|
---
| | Derek,

**What will Virginia look like in a decade?** That's a question I often ask myself.

I'm not sure I know the answer, but here's something I do know: what we do in 2019 and 2020 will _determine Virginia 's future_ for the next decade, if not longer.

But before I go any further, I have to ask -- **can you make a donation to my good friend Mark Warner 's campaign for Senate? Take it from me: We need him in the Senate if we want to defend our health care and secure our elections.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01e/53d9897e/523d0003/1c890cd6/3933907206/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?express_lane=true&refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")** **[DONATE "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?express_lane=true&refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01e/53d9897e/523d0003/1c890cd3/3933907206/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?express_lane=true&refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01e/53d9897e/523d0003/1c890cd2/3933907206/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?express_lane=true&refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01e/53d9897e/523d0003/1c890cd1/3933907206/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
There are two things we need to do if we want to turn Virginia completely blue, and then protect our hard-earned progress:
* **FIRST** , we must flip the General Assembly. That's why, with less than a week left, Mark has been campaigning with our stellar slate of Democratic candidates across the Commonwealth. But nothing's guaranteed and at the last minute, Virginia Republicans have called in Mike Pence to campaign for them.
* **SECOND** , if we can retake the House of Delegates and the Virginia Senate, we'll need to protect our gains and make sure VA stays blue. That means _we must send Mark Warner back to the Senate in 2020._ We currently have a narrow path to retaking the Senate, but there's no way we can win a new Democratic majority without re-electing Mark.

**[So, knowing what 's at stake, can you pitch in and support Mark's campaign? It would mean an awful lot to him and to me.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01e/53d9897e/523d0003/1c890cd0/3933907206/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thanks for your support,
Tim | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d01e/53d9897e/523d0003/1c890cdf/3933907206/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-kainedecade?refcode=20191031nd__310__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

SECOND , if we can retake the House of Delegates and the Virginia Senate, we'll need to protect our gains and make sure VA stays blue. That means we must send Mark Warner back to the Senate in 2020. We currently have a narrow path to retaking the Senate, but there's no way we can win a new Democratic majority without re-electing Mark. "" Thanks for your support, Tim | "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: A few hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
We can win this and take back the majority in the Senate. But that means making every day count--especially at deadlines like this. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a782e1/1037280256/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Tonight marks our October fundraising deadline, friend. And what we raise by midnight will shape the next chapter of this campaign.

The last ten weeks have convinced me we have a real shot at winning this seat next year. We've seen it in polling. We've heard it as Coloradans tell us about their appetite for change in Washington.

**And here 's one of the biggest tells: Mitch McConnell is so worried about Cory Gardner that he's planning to funnel millions to special-interest allies who'll spend big to defend this seat.**

We can win this and take back the majority in the Senate. But that means making every day count--especially at deadlines like this.

[**_There are just a few hours left to chip in before the deadline and help build the grassroots team that can take on Mitch McConnell 's machine. Can you step up now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191031_JH_20191031-fr-JH-EOM8-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191031_JH_20191031-fr-JH-EOM8-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a7821c/1037280256/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a7821d/1037280256/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a7821a/1037280256/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a7821b/1037280256/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a78218/1037280256/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a78219/1037280256/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771496/691c9bd/6fe35487/11a7821c/1037280256/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: this is tough news to get
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'll be quick, everyone.
My team let me know that we needed to raise $6,500 earlier this week to get our October fundraising on track. They also told me that we fell short.
It's tough to get news like this given how important reaching our fundraising goal is. I won my last race by only 1,017 votes, and Republicans will be scrutinizing my fundraising numbers for signs of weakness. That's why it's so important that we make up ground tonight.
[**Will you please help close the gap? We 've got a hole to fill. It's pretty urgent but with your help, I think we can do it. $3 or more would go a really long way, if you're able.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d6/2a380d31/3d555961/f0ed60/459228352/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfTVdIXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_MWH_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Mitch McConnell and his allies poured record-breaking amounts of money in to New Hampshire to defeat me last time, and they're bound to do it again. If we miss our fundraising goals, they'll buy this seat back for another Republican in Trump's back pocket.
**I know we ask a lot of you but since you 're one of my top supporters, I've got to ask again: [will you please give $3 or more to protect New Hampshire's Democratic Senate seat?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d6/2a380d31/3d555961/f0ed60/459228352/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfTVdIXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_MWH_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you, I really do appreciate it.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d6/2a380d31/3d555961/f0ed60/459228352/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfTVdIXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_MWH_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d6/2a380d31/3d555961/f0ed61/459228352/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc86c/3eb3e2fc/55a1e2be/744d8543/225188751/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc86c/3eb3e2fc/55a1e2be/744d8542/225188751/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Do you stand with science?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Donald Trump will start taking swings at me -- soon.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7464?t=3&akid=7979%2E868730%2EfCy3d1) Friend, Today is our big end-of-month deadline -- I'll be honest: [**I'm going to ask for a grassroots donation of $1 or more because your support is actually incredibly crucial to our progress.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7464?t=5&akid=7979%2E868730%2EfCy3d1) Here's why. This summer, Donald Trump claimed he was the "world's best environmentalist." Why would he say something like that when he's even gone so far as to gut the _Endangered Species Act_? Because he knows this is his most vulnerable issue. About 70% of Americans don't trust Trump on environmental issues -- this is the biggest margin on any issue. Seriously imagine 70% of Americans agreeing on anything -- but on the environment they know Donald Trump is a fraud. But what does Donald Trump do when he's cornered? _He fights back._ He fights nasty. He fights hard. That's why I have no doubt in my mind that he'll start taking swings at me. The Republican Governors Association has raised over $200 million to help those swings land, and they'll want to help the boss any way they can. With just three incumbent governors to target in 2020, we all know what they're planning. **We don't need $200 million to fight back. But we do need $25,000 by midnight tonight. We've already raised $21,865 to get us there -- will your donation help close the gap?** [**Donate $1 or more right now to show Republicans you stand with science.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7464?t=7&akid=7979%2E868730%2EfCy3d1) Very truly yours, Jay | [CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7464?t=8&akid=7979%2E868730%2EfCy3d1)

clean_body: it’s Halloween, and the scariest thing on my mind is unhinged Democrats trying to overturn the results of the 2016 election. They’re determined to... Friend \- it’s Halloween, and the scariest thing on my mind is unhinged Democrats trying to overturn the results of the 2016 election. They’re determined to impeach President Trump before he wins re-election, and it’s up to us in the conservative grassroots to stop them. If you want to stop Nancy Pelosi and her socialist friends in the House from impeaching President Trump, please step up as one of 60 Sixth District Hoosiers to contribute to our October End of Month Impeachment Defense Fund – before midnight tonight. Use this personalized, secure link to chip in ANY amount by tonight at 11:59pm: Thanks, -Greg \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Pence Finance Team Subject: make Pelosi hear us To: 60 Hoosiers Needed STOP Impeachment Chip in by October 31st to stand with Greg Friend, Make America Great Again – it’s what President Trump promised, and it’s what he has delivered for us. A historically strong economy and job numbers. Fixing our immigration crisis. Cutting regulations and confirming record numbers of judges to the federal bench. [ [by tomorrow @ 11:59pm] Chip in to help me stop Democrats from impeaching President Trump ]() So how do Democrats react to this great American renewal? Not by reaching across the aisle to work with us on a commonsense infrastructure plan, or ANYTHING else of value to the American people. Instead, Democrats have chosen to IMPEACH our duly elected president. Greg refuses to stand idly by as they make a petty political fight into another ugly, drawn-out conflict the American people are forced to watch. October End of Month Impeachment Defense Fund Deadline: October 31st @ 11:59pm Your ID: By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Wall Street bonuses amounted to more than two and a half times the total earnings of all minimum wage workers, the state of Texas has over 800,000 uninsured children because of falling federal funding, and since the 1970's wages haven't kept up with worker's skyrocketing productivity. All of these statistics are just a way to show how the wealthiest in this country are thriving while working people are being left behind. I am running for Congress to fix that.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11409771/116094786/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ1YmRkOS0yOGZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eORCNghsQ8dyeW98OKeOJfnko2mlJBIUF9w2TGXXXfY=&refcode=em103119) Now, these facts are pretty scary but we can do something about them. clean_body: Peter, We have a spooky deadline coming up tonight at midnight!!! Tonight is our end of the month deadline but also happens to be Halloween. I was trying to think of something that would scare you but I figured I would just go with some facts: Wall Street bonuses amounted to more than two and a half times the total earnings of all minimum wage workers, the state of Texas has over 800,000 uninsured children because of falling federal funding, and since the 1970's wages haven't kept up with worker's skyrocketing productivity. All of these statistics are just a way to show how the wealthiest in this country are thriving while working people are being left behind. I am running for Congress to fix that. Now, these facts are pretty scary but we can do something about them. We need people in office who will fight for the people, not corporate profit. That is what I am running to do in Congress. I need your support to help me get there. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

body:
We're glad you're joining the movement!

mailto:2020@amyfororegon.com

** Hi,
Peter
!
------------------------------------------------------------

**
Thanks for Joining Team Amy!
------------------------------------------------------------

**
Our American values are on the line -- and the battle starts right here in Oregon. The 2020 election will be the most important election in our lifetime, and our country’s future depends on how we fight back.
------------------------------------------------------------
Winning this election and taking a seat away from the Democrats in 2020 is going to take thousands of Oregonians just like you coming together to raise their voices, together.

That's why I decided to raise my voice by running for Congress in 2020. I will push for conservative values, the protection of your rights, and to fight against the Socialist agenda that has infected the Democrat Party and our beautiful state.
My team and I value your support and we appreciate you for joining our movement. This campaign isn’t about personalities and ego: It’s about you - it’s about all of us. I need your help. Here are some things you can do next to support our campaign:

FIRST: Follow Amy on Facebook (https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=1a7915cf23&e=36bbc8e2ca) , Twitter (https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=2d3300996e&e=36bbc8e2ca) and Instagram (https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=c680c0953d&e=36bbc8e2ca) for real-time updates.

SECOND: Consider donating to our grassroots campaign by clicking to this secure donation portal (https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=e4e46e5523&e=36bbc8e2ca) .

THEN: Forward this email to five of your friends and family and encourage them to get involved by adding their name to our movement just like you did. They can join our movement by clicking here (https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=54bed16078&e=36bbc8e2ca) .
Thanks again for joining my campaign for Congress. We’re so happy to have you on our team.

============================================================

| Team: Tonight's end-of-month deadline is crucial for us to show our grassroots strength, but right now, we're still coming up short of our goal.

_**[Ed Markey is counting on your help to get across the finish line. Will you rush a donation before midnight?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-103119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *

We weren't expecting to be scared until tonight for Halloween, but we checked on our progress this morning for Ed Markey's October goal, and we're coming up $12,000 short.

_**[Can Ed count on you to pitch in before midnight and help us close the gap?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-103119_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

With Congressman Joe Kennedy III challenging Ed and his progressive agenda, we're now facing two opponents.

That means it'll take double the effort to fight for the issues most important to you.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Lizzie Fletcher Votes For Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

On January 3rd, the day Lizzie Fletcher was sworn into office, her fellow freshman Democrat Rashida Tlaib stated that House Democrats were going impeach the President of the United States. Tlaib’s expletive-laced threat directed at the President was a major step in the Democratic party’s crusade to abolish the results of the 2016 election.

Today, Lizzie Fletcher joined with Tlaib in an effort to make that threat a reality. By voting for impeachment, Fletcher violated her pledge to voters that she would be a moderate and independent voice for the people of the 7th District.

House Democrats like Fletcher, Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have always had the intention of impeaching President Trump, no matter how little evidence they had of an impeachable offense.

They hate the President so much that they cannot focus on anything but impeaching him. Before the Ukraine investigation, it was the Mueller probe, and before that, it was the emoluments clause.

7th District voters elected Fletcher to represent us and fight for the issues that matter most to our district. We elected her to defend our energy jobs, not support fracking bans that target the oil and gas industry. We elected her to pass USMCA to keep our economy strong, not allow it to be sidelined by investigation after investigation. We elected her to be an independent voice, not vote with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time.

In 2020, we have the opportunity to make a change that protects our energy sector, that will save thousands of jobs and that will provide stability again for our community. Our district deserves a serious representative who is prepared to lead on these issues.

With your help, we can take our district back, build on the tremendous economy we enjoy and safeguard our energy sector for the next generation of Houstonians.

Sincerely,

Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3379a0c3edae4d7ea2b123163bad865e&_e=f2au7_XN2-A8QTC7lcg9PsCLItFWpu3hPXfEwdwu9apMLeI3uK2xtvEuKkKTKytAyzAoQc1N40szpHUmKX3qhmodsgzv6O6CAQgXMnmNvm1Q2YgI29sKMVWOOIsEsbTfuK1E3n5VTFGwzyu5dclwXhjZmBE3n-aJShCrRy5LcOcHEutoK6jja3etZfSTMmF9HF-whfhWUzh0XvtT5-MQsOvNq95XhLGJT9Ox3D762dcTb2iA2alTBFV7oaqiao4I44V32YCnYbE1IAyTquun_h4jp1yCI1X4CNbEdyMUM10%3D)****

| Friends -

We only have a few hours left to hit our October fundraising goal, and we're in an all out sprint to the finish to ensure we hit $175,OOO before midnight!!

**Here 's what we know:** 90% of Democratic voters are still undecided, and unlike other candidates, Michael doesn't have a celebrity media profile or a billionaire's bank account.

[Hitting this deadline will allow us to keep airing our TV ads, knocking doors, and reaching out to the hundreds of thousands of undecided voters across the country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae5c/134673f2/a4b6ee9/6997f7ef/3878589633/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B2_103119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Margaret Good
subject: You want to know what’s really scary???
body:
Hi friend, some people are terrified of clowns. Others are scared by vampires or ghosts, and some people get a fright from Freddy Kreuger look-a-likes. You want to know what really freaks me out? Not hitting our goals!

But guess what!? We’re only $693 away from making our October goal. We’re scary close!

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.31_b2_mg_all&amount=25&recurring=auto]

In honor of Halloween, where the goal is to scare as many people as possible, may I suggest you donate to our campaign and make this a very scary Halloween for our opponent, Vern Buchanan. Let’s show him that soon he will no longer be able to vote to take people’s healthcare, to repeal clean water regulations, or to permit oil drilling miles from the Everglades. It’s scary for him, but a treat for us--we are building the grassroots army to vote him out!

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.31_b2_mg_all&amount=25&recurring=auto

Thanks for making this a very happy Halloween!
Margaret

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: BREAKING: House votes to move forward with impeachment inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The House just voted on the rules that the impeachment inquiry will follow. This vote was the first concerning impeachment taken by the House since Speaker Pelosi announced the inquiry \-- and, unsurprisingly, not a single Republican voted for it. Trump is doing everything in his power to threaten and obstruct the impeachment inquiry, including calling it a "Witch Hunt" and a "Hoax." He's even mentioned pursuing criminal charges against Democratic leaders, so we NEED to know where the average Democratic voter stands: **Do you support the House impeachment inquiry?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4d/6e9863e8/15eb6684/1db0843f/1890361969/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/8iWKu8QP") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4d/6e9863e8/15eb6684/1db0843f/1890361969/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/8iWKu8QP") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4d/6e9863e8/15eb6684/1db0843e/1890361969/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191031b.ND-b&refcode2=ms4q0N5q5BKjkwgFTPXb")

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: This is scary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We have a fundraising deadline tonight. But that's not what's scary. What's scary is thinking Smith will be elected again.
|
---

| | Friends, This fundraising deadline tonight isn't what's frightening me. When it comes down to it, **there 's nothing scarier** than watching your own member of Congress sit in the same seat and do nothing for 39 years to protect you. **But unfortunately, that isn't all.** Chris Smith could actually get elected _again_. **And that 's the scariest thing you'll hear today.** We can't let that happen. **So I 'm asking you to step up and make sure our communities and families aren't frightened by Smith's policies anymore: [Can you donate just $10 to make sure we make our fundraising deadline tonight?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff086/522d4087/7afd56c6/4f342258/2680514619/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191031_em_halloween_atest&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+donate+just+10+to+make+sure+we+m&utm_campaign=20191031_em&source=20191031_em")** If you dig a little deeper, we won't just come out on top in numbers--but we will defeat Chris Smith and make sure you have a great leader to represent you. I have to run, but I hope to see you around the district. Thank you so much and Happy Halloween! Stephanie
_Sent from my iPhone_
---
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff086/522d4087/7afd56c6/4f342257/2680514619/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20191031_em&source=20191031_em") at any time._

name: One Year Out via Zoe Lofgren
subject: Election Day is coming up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Team, on November 3, 2020, we’re going to learn a lot about our country.

Will Democrats hold the House? Will we take the Senate? Will Donald Trump remain in the White House?

If Zoe Lofgren has anything to do with it (and BELIEVE us, she does!) one thing is certain - we’re going to spend the next year FIGHTING for our folks, including the seven crucial California seats that will make or break the House majority. | | I need you to make a critical choice before tonight's End of Month Deadline: We can either sit back, just barely miss our goal, and shut our campaign's doors for good. **Or we can rise up, CLINCH tonight 's $800K goal, and rescue every inch of progress we've fought to achieve.** **_[I 'm now more than 95% of the way to my make-or-break goal. With one final surge of support, I know we can fill our last budget hole and prove everyone who ever doubted us wrong. Can I count on your critical $5 before tonight's End of Month Deadline? Your gift will be matched for these final 10 hours. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191031_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_** Unfortunately, I don't have billions in personal wealth to blanket the air with TV ads. But I would never forgive myself if I allowed us to be cut from the running because I didn't ask for your help. **That 's why I'm asking you for money. Not because I like it, but because I'm relying on you more than anything.** I'm more than 95% of the way to hitting tonight's End of Month goal and saving this movement. Can I count on you? **Tonight 's deadline is so urgent, every contribution will be matched for these final 10 hours. ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc870/3eb3e2fc/55abcb43/744d86b3/2225978171/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191031_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs")**

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc870/3eb3e2fc/55abcb43/744d86bc/2225978171/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc870/3eb3e2fc/55abcb43/744d86bb/2225978171/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc870/3eb3e2fc/55abcb43/744d86ba/2225978171/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Not because I like it, but because I'm relying on you more than anything. I'm more than 95% of the way to hitting tonight's End of Month goal and saving this movement. Can I count on you? Tonight 's deadline is so urgent, every contribution will be matched for these final 10 hours. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: we need to treat the 2020 election just like HALLOWEEN 👻🎃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I remember being a kid, planning out my trick-or-treating strategy to maximize the amount of candy I could get for Halloween.

**And the simplest strategy was always the best -- the more doors I knocked, the more candy I got. **

**Well, the same principle will apply for us in the 2020 election -- the more doors we knock, the more votes we'll get.**

_If we are going to win, we need to treat the 2020 election just like Halloween -- knock on as many doors as possible to turn out votes!_

[**Will you chip in the cost of a King-Size candy bar ($1.35) to our 2020 voter turnout efforts before our MIDNIGHT DEADLINE?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/s3psOlS3em2_FukgRJCRnBrBkQOKvzXMgTpufIsJM3c=/0e4nUniSunStM6OZHZU5niyIy04qlTFadT6fKOnivAY=?refcode=X_103119_EOM_D&amount=1.35&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/s3psOlS3em2_FukgRJCRnBrBkQOKvzXMgTpufIsJM3c=/0e4nUniSunStM6OZHZU5niyIy04qlTFadT6fKOnivAY=?refcode=X_103119_EOM_D&amount=1.35&recurring=auto)

Have a SPOOKtacular Halloween,

\-- _Greg Stanton_

Peter --

You know what's scaring me more than any ghosts or goblins this Halloween? The prospect of not hitting our end-of-month goal, the possibility that we won't be able to stick to our campaign plan as a result, and **the idea of another six years of Senator John Cornyn!**

Look Peter, I didn't want to write this email. I'd much rather be handing out candy bars to trick-or-treaters (and maybe having one or two myself). **But our end-of-month deadline is just hours away and we 're still $5,009 short of our goal. [Until midnight every dollar you donate is being MATCHED -- can MJ count on you to chip in now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890890/7f51f7bc/4b3cc83a/4ef342b1/443418387/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oct19-eommatch?refcode=email_20191031.2nd__464__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890890/7f51f7bc/4b3cc83a/4ef342b1/443418387/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oct19-eommatch?refcode=email_20191031.2nd__464__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Senator Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest thanks to help from his corporate PAC allies -- no surprise after he's spent nearly 20 years selling Texans out to special interests like Big Pharma and the gun lobby. So if we're going to build a campaign as big as Texas that's capable of taking him on and _winning_ , we have to stay on track and meet this goal!

**We may be behind now, but the good news is there 's still time to turn things around. Will you rush a matched donation before midnight to help us reach our $45,000 end-of-month goal and defeat Senator Cornyn? **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We may be behind now, but the good news is there 's still time to turn things around. Will you rush a matched donation before midnight to help us reach our $45,000 end-of-month goal and defeat Senator Cornyn? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, John Coady Deputy Campaign Manager "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

subject: Only a few hours left.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
It's happening NOW. Will you join us to make history? |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2bc9af788b&e=3e017fab0f)

|

| Friend,

We all know Cory Booker, the egotistical con man, has to go. **Hirsh Singh has been on the forefront of that fight, calling him out at every turn. But he needs**** _your_****help.**

New Jerseyans pay some of the highest taxes in the country and what do we get for that? Because of Democrat policies, we get poverty, crime, failing infrastructure and an assault on our children’s futures.

Republican U.S. Senate Candidate Hirsh Singh pledges to:
---
| |
* Stop illegal immigration and protect our borders
* Defend the Second Amendment
* Defend and promote LIFE
* Repair our infrastructure
* Support religious freedom
* Fix education and eliminate Common Core

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=d131fc49d4&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020")
---
| Friend, our campaign is possible because of generous contributions from people like you — people who believe that America is the greatest nation in the history of the world; indeed, a nation _worth_ defending against leftist extremism and tyranny.

**The Democrats are vulnerable; they’ve exposed their soft underbellies with baseless attempts to undo all the good President Trump has accomplished.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b317d3f912&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $20.20 FOR 2020")
---
| Our campaign has exposed Cory the con man for the corrupt liar that he’s always been. **_That’s_****why we’re getting nationwide attention.**

Republicans across the country want to see ‘Spartacus’ removed from politics and see our state return to prosperity. New Jersey is winnable — but _only if we keep sticking together_.

Since we began, we’ve received contributions from donors across all fifty states, plus over 360 towns and cities in just New Jersey. Our average contributor gives over $45 and many of our supporters have pledged automatic monthly donations of $10, $20, $50 as well as $100 or more.

**_Together, we can make New Jersey a Republican state FOR THE PEOPLE._** Help us fight the Democrats by chipping in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more — whatever you can manage.

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $500](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=3400e70126&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $500")

| [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b2802d496b&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=84b686f9df&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT")
---
| Every dollar matters and no effort is too small. Thank you for your time and generous help.

**— Team Hirsh Singh**
_For the People_

* * *

P.S. For far too long, New Jerseyans have suffered from Democrat abuse; now is the time to **take back our state**.

It’s not too late to send Cory Booker packing for good and save our state from corruption. Your contribution to the Singh For Senate campaign helps restore American values to New Jersey. And if you’re a Jerseyan yourself, please remember to vote Republican next week on November 5th to stop Phil Murphy!

To learn more about Hirsh, please join us at [SinghForThePeople.com](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=7bc6388a3e&e=3e017fab0f)

subject: we're behind
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11412781/116127694/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0YTIxZS0zYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vab8R-ajp_a4xLp8Jt79R26mzieJdDbiqAQUagKDj6Y=&emci=d3039bdc-39fc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=06e4a21e-3afc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Friend — I’m going to keep this short: **We’re less than 12 hours from our end of month fundraising deadline and we’re not where we need to be.** This month we experienced the most outrageous attacks of the campaign to date, with Tulsi on the receiving end of a smear campaign by Hillary Clinton and her powerful proxies and allies in the establishment media. They honestly think they can get away with this, friend — and in 2016, they did — **but not this time**. They’re underestimating the strength of our movement, and we must prove them wrong. **[With Tulsi in the crosshairs of vicious and baseless attacks, now is not the time to be taking our foot off the gas. Can Tulsi count on you to meet our end of month deadline in fighting shape? Pitch in $12 now and let's show we have what it takes to win this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11412783/116127696/-1363700792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0YTIxZS0zYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vab8R-ajp_a4xLp8Jt79R26mzieJdDbiqAQUagKDj6Y=&refcode=em191031_2_ask&amount=12&refcode2=06e4a21e-3afc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)** [DONATE $12 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11412793/116127706/279921833?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0YTIxZS0zYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vab8R-ajp_a4xLp8Jt79R26mzieJdDbiqAQUagKDj6Y=&refcode=em191031_2_button&amount=12&refcode2=06e4a21e-3afc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) The worst of the attacks are far from behind us. The truth is that the louder and more powerful we become, the bigger a target Tulsi becomes for all those who profit from the multi trillion dollar military industrial complex and from the corrupt establishment. They’re scared of losing their grip on power, they’re scared of a government that is truly of the people, by the people, and for the people. Tulsi is undaunted by the fight ahead, our first female combat veteran to run for President is no stranger to tough fights or long odds, but she needs your help. Tulsi is taking this fight directly to the people — with a packed schedule of townhalls and meet and greets, with big ad spends in the early states, with signs and boots on the ground. The best thing you can do right now to help Tulsi rise above the smear campaigns is to help her keep speaking truth to power.**[Can you pitch in $12 right now, before we close the books for the month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11412797/116127710/-1363700792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0YTIxZS0zYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vab8R-ajp_a4xLp8Jt79R26mzieJdDbiqAQUagKDj6Y=&refcode=em191031_2_ask_2&amount=12&refcode2=06e4a21e-3afc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)** [DONATE $12 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11412801/116127714/279921833?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0YTIxZS0zYWZjLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vab8R-ajp_a4xLp8Jt79R26mzieJdDbiqAQUagKDj6Y=&refcode=em191031_2_button_2&amount=12&refcode2=06e4a21e-3afc-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) TULSI2020
---

clean_body: | | | | Friend — I’m going to keep this short: We’re less than 12 hours from our end of month fundraising deadline and we’re not where we need to be. This month we experienced the most outrageous attacks of the campaign to date, with Tulsi on the receiving end of a smear campaign by Hillary Clinton and her powerful proxies and allies in the establishment media. They honestly think they can get away with this, friend — and in 2016, they did — but not this time. They’re underestimating the strength of our movement, and we must prove them wrong. The worst of the attacks are far from behind us. The truth is that the louder and more powerful we become, the bigger a target Tulsi becomes for all those who profit from the multi trillion dollar military industrial complex and from the corrupt establishment. They’re scared of losing their grip on power, they’re scared of a government that is truly of the people, by the people, and for the people. Tulsi is undaunted by the fight ahead, our first female combat veteran to run for President is no stranger to tough fights or long odds, but she needs your help. Tulsi is taking this fight directly to the people — with a packed schedule of townhalls and meet and greets, with big ad spends in the early states, with signs and boots on the ground. The best thing you can do right now to help Tulsi rise above the smear campaigns is to help her keep speaking truth to power. TULSI2020 | | PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW PO Box 75255 Kapolei HI 96707 The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you.
