House Democrats voted on a resolution to start the impeachment process against President Trump today! While this is mainly a procedural vote, they....

Friend,

House Democrats voted on a resolution to start the impeachment process against President Trump today! While this is mainly a procedural vote, they will try to blow this way out of proportion to change public opinion in favor of impeachment.

Pelosi and Schiff have conducted their impeachment sham behind closed doors – IN SECRET! They’ve been doing it for months. Today’s vote is just another attempt by Dem leadership to legitimize a process that has gone off the rails.

**We must stop the liberal witch hunt! **

I’ve counted on you a lot in the past year, but our President WILL BE IMPEACHED by the House Democrats if we don’t fight back. [**Will you give $10, $25 or $50 to stop the impeachment?**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=5825db0d61f94abea16ac307aab663e0&_e=sPb1kbaXmqbGcK55biwpegs8g0VDm0wNP_fjo08yLYl71zfYVus7M9zC-Z_SjyNQ6FUtrX6QgZByXVgfFJP_eVGc7sOhNUlthcnF64lI7k5-aAgOoPsy_Hfdk1slkPj3hQ1Lwdq0Bn2bLFfB7vWVKhpFBrTCkpHST5S7JLtCH2m2nYQd2mqw-vEFSLluMrZ4MjzfdpKIYNuXb0snhO9VeYokfhLSclLA9mLKoNS6GyfceE5PFuebbxumDockTopb1MT6a3NlVLhlcjmqsrs_qAVc2_aoFCTg-HPl6Cr1iV4nFVKQ-Ds3WruQYPx1DC3lCsLPSONFiaacNPcoeQ4WoQISkRXhQujnRXl49s0WgwTbOkLhSpl8zrD90fxmZi4fBVPM9wNyDCBTjOE7oSz4G2C1FLITTeBwSKe-iu0Ln_IhD1RzGfkHNLKQYlS38PWY)

Now, if you’re still reading this, we know you’re _really_ ready to stand up and protect Texas. name: Laura Loomer
subject: 🎃 How to Scare a Democrat
body:
This morning, liberal Democrats pulled the ultimate trick or treat on Halloween.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700386-2ed747684f-fab71eb0b0)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0) This morning, liberal Democrats pulled the ultimate trick or treat on Halloween.

Treating their radical base while tricking the rest of America, they served up a vote to move forward on impeachment in a political play to scare voters before the 2020 elections.

They want to drive the Silent Majority into hiding, but **here’s your chance to stand up to their tactics**.

Send a clear message to Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Ilhan Omar and “the Squad” **on this Halloween** by [**backing my run for Congress**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0).

[**Show them you’re supporting Laura Loomer for Congress by making a donation today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0)

I watched Ocasio-Cortez on Fox News this morning when asked about the solemn matter of impeaching the President of the United States and she giggled and said, “It’s very spooky to some people in the White House. hehehehe.”

November 2020 cannot come fast enough!

These leftist and socialist Democrats have nothing to fear right now. **The media will not confront them** as they toss softballs to them on a daily basis – **but I will, and I have**.

Ocasio-Cortez has literally run away from me.

Ilhan Omar had me swarmed by her supporters as she slithered away.

Rashida Tlaib literally assaulted me when I confronted her – and I still stood my ground.
Help me win this election, and it’s no promise, **it’s a guarantee** :

The entire “Squad” will think twice about disrespecting their office and our nation, because every time they do, **I will be walking right into their office to set them straight**.
All you have to do is help me win in November of 2020 [**by supporting my campaign now**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0).

**We are just a few thousand dollars away from hitting our October fundraising goal** , one that will shock Democrats AGAIN! [**Help us get there by donating today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0)

And after you donate, be sure to [**send the special message**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0) that I’ve prepared for Nancy Pelosi, AOC, Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar.

Thank you again for all that you do and please be safe tonight!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Help me hit our October goal by donating before midnight. And after you donate, you’ll get a chance to send a special message to Nancy, Ilhan, AOC and Tlaib that will give them a fright! [**Please donate now.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352181-819208-4700387-6c46809357-fab71eb0b0)

|

_America's Newsletter has an important message from the National Republican Congressional Committee._
* * *

Friend,

name: Bill Weld
subject: what we have left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FMFYIBLqHe3q876DPSweA2s&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=1) Team — I’m going to ask you to make a small contribution to my campaign, but let me explain why it’s important we hit our $150,000 goal first. **We’re at a pivotal moment in this race.** The polls have us **_chasing down_** President Trump’s lead in key states like New Hampshire, and they show that conservative and independent voters are looking for someone else to vote for in their 2020 primary. **_With Thanksgiving and the holiday season around the corner,_****_ we’re expecting a drop in donations right before the first in the nation primaries and caucuses, a time in which we should be investing MORE in our voter outreach programs and digital ads._** As of right now, **we’re $25,000 short of our goal** and we need to get as many grassroots contributions in **before TONIGHT at midnight** if we want to have the infrastructure we need to win this primary. [**Can you help us close the gap by making a contribution today before our midnight deadline?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FMFYIBLqHe3q876DPSweA2s&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=2) | | [DONATE ⇨ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeD4no3WPwaNcSmnFwpDuA1FMFYIBLqHe3q876DPSweA2s&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=3)
---
Thank you for your support,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=4).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191031_fr_s&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: very short email but very important
body:
We only have a few more hours to go until midnight and...

Friends, I'll keep this short and sweet:
We have a critical end-of-month deadline coming up in just a few hours, and we haven't hit our October fundraising goal yet.
If you've been waiting to make a contribution, now is the perfect time. I really need you to chip in before midnight. Even $3 makes a big difference.
You can use this link:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/OctoberGoal](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd7/4bef7a87/6b0d9dc6/287fc455/3365327347/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191031-2-full")**
I really hope you'll consider making a contribution tonight. Sara and I are counting on you.
\- Amy

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd7/4bef7a87/6b0d9dc6/287fc454/3365327347/VEsE/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cd7/4bef7a87/6b0d9dc6/287fc42b/3365327347/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: John Cornyn
subject: We must stop the liberal witch hunt!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc
body:
House Democrats voted on a resolution to start the impeachment process against President Trump today! While this is mainly a procedural vote, they....

Friend,

House Democrats voted on a resolution to start the impeachment process against President Trump today! While this is mainly a procedural vote, they will try to blow this way out of proportion to change public opinion in favor of impeachment.

Pelosi and Schiff have conducted their impeachment sham behind closed doors – IN SECRET! They’ve been doing it for months. Today’s vote is just another attempt by Dem leadership to legitimize a process that has gone off the rails.

**We must stop the liberal witch hunt! **

I’ve counted on you a lot in the past year, but our President WILL BE IMPEACHED by the House Democrats if we don’t fight back. [**Will you give $10, $25 or $50 to stop the impeachment?**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexj6AKytAhz_HkGLIaxl9Si8S_K-JNiUVMz_n4_dS9ciBIwm0IvTysKZOG3N3fSVlEcRCtbA3Db-yRu6kJe439-N5-0RT5nWAasH_3sBOkSi3s3R5uFlY51EuUA5C0MMmvZ5OHkklD6O8L6Of1jUuLbGXfwMEpyGPhzvJMSq4TjwJ4Wah22nb1QgjLs8pOqw6ou2ZAD5m2Q7uq44H4fTijg71Zqq5K86hT9RDfaQt0W_9SoSPI0ApxeSEDvm7x4x8lvCxdS-a-4-Kx7KFGFWNjxKSKHfImSvZ_B7WN1AMEU2qMrgH5boUohK3Bg60FOszAT5a-wYznj9hbkw0H91T9ykaUMrLbnN8oY_jR3i51k8LE7uCUMk_CES2svq3ekvXVgOl4031SPQHohVZqwFjN4_JOW6FNX-WkdkMUiscpdCG)
****[GIVE NOW: STOP IMPEACHMENT](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexj6AKytAhz_HkGLIaxl9Si8S_K-JNiUVMz_n4_dS9ciBIwm0IvTysKZOG3N3fSVlEcRCtbA3Db-yRu6kJe439-N5-0RT5nWAasH_3sBOkSi3s3R5uFlY51EuUA5C0MMmvZ5OHkklD6O8L6Of1jUuLbGXfwMEpyGPhzvJMSq4TjwJ4Wah22nb1QgjLs8pOqw6ogRB6Cw96PkUtKcQimg1_FlTvZJZJSNG3WBK91EWhY6SbIKlqJzEM91Srf2iyvne5jsN7APJdNQJmi4lmfsuaxYPAi77PXzOummj2oD-Eb5pygKYRnU15nFLvpDBEmcvdh-GOSylSbku9mrKHq4kf8agnMBEc4Yrt1bvKcUbZfXKJPFKVkec9Rca6MNaeqLKHsrS3ckadaIJmsnlrr_N93WRJMM_7BDJMJYlRY507auP)** **
---
Friend, Pelosi wouldn’t call for this vote if she didn’t think it would turn public opinion to favor impeachment. She is smart, but we are smarter! We can counter her witch hunt together.

[**I know you care about our nation, so can you give $10, $25 or $50 to stop the Democrats from tearing our institutions apart with their partisan politics?**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexj6AKytAhz_HkGLIaxl9Si8S_K-JNiUVMz_n4_dS9ciBIwm0IvTysKZOG3N3fSVlEcRCtbA3Db-yRu6kJe439-N5-0RT5nWAasH__y5DhtuL0dMMF3)
****[GIVE NOW: STOP IMPEACHMENT](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexj6AKytAhz_HkGLIaxl9Si8S_K-JNiUVMz_n4_dS9ciBIwm0IvTysKZOG3N3fSVlEcRCtbA3Db-yRu6kJe439-N5-0RT5nWAasH_3sBOkSi3s3R5uFlY51EuUA5C0MMmvZ5OHkklD6O8L6Of1jUuLbGXfwMEpyGPhzvJMSq4TjwJ4Wah22nb1QgjLs8pOqw6ouNb5RHuWLtPEeA2_T3id_MTx4HndR2QkRuA0kQUBnsU1yk16GzdLQAVKCxRDhiptshNPwOI1S0IERN5wKYmnRnp57uDRKmFU7KutKhcUCWUacRUlcLArp_wqbBHJbj4mvwo46f6jDxDH0JWPVT2R-4o4VxSl-xIcRohmy4iFknnCybeiBE2wZTtehDmD9RxWDgIEXTX_4I8yPDp0plJvmtO6G6rl8sE568pfc8cSGfv)** **

With you on board, we’re one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we’re glad you’re on board. Now that you’re on Team Cornyn, make sure that you’re keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexl7pfWJ-8W5ntPk8gO6_uTCE9YPgrm5l32V2rLCayK7cBTi9biNBM5luAP42vvBAt3urSl_BpbN0g8zhUwezb2vJPSCQXZF3N_-U0uvUmoguRqXY0mCxZZ1zML_NidXX4Xm-_CJvOkhlVGvrT34984-omllRfDEB1ZfM7iGR2qJPbDturPkrCUhapO8XCXfSqq7PkM7C1kKeafhvqWBh92lDxb0PAxm1SPXrjGR6lPr7DL-CqL4oi9BQZo5QBf8tJw%3D%3D) and [Twitter](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexqURCrcAVrgQdSHTF8FS7OaTF6AaxKNbT-oTg4NYTaQKjZVpBZkDBD7u56l5sUVwI0XOxPmI0EnX-_8qw_T39MMJKReo0wKSuIMpo1vWUBXAy2kHvL_fqrHmRc0mEcyPjSNtNhqZuiPm-xQJgoAbaD54GF0PvhGBJxqR2KQW728nKDupI-5Ii7xxO2cWHoFgHL0zLIRlmSBbVQ5ksFg7tNXr4NQzbJd1WP8Vw0h-_N_6gmmCse1r6Ar5nTvczZsjnA%3D%3D) – that way you’ll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you’re still reading this, we know you’re _really_ ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexrocGsVcREFmWQPDV_pvUI-lfP6DuiGDtsFrhO0FYNYL3P_jLk3dlI0AL3sCPQzSsOitaGuAvfNvgobYiut5GFmU9kxpC0AWkiwerB-qJMLN240kiWnibqdl59W2SV-Wyfq22IDpO5eAZkMypSTzfJCHqJxRIwzpe6F_sOsD8ouhLRcPVcDl2FLRV9jPgauTjs0o207XByPFsxZSCHcq0d7zF2sqAuZOW_oAO7DIrhWkL3Mq6oUheSF7ahu0WaS_vZ4-Zd3YGJlRiWIgKHR0LZI%3D) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you’re pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexhYpDjaAS_Gp3J6OFJDY3oS5Q_RlD60SQX6PIPbnfipOCG4iuxqfkBm0vAIFMj6yQenu6_U2cbnZttI19eZ_W4OWyihCPYpSYhr9goqNz0alKRwBf5w574Z6CLFmTJE9kQD_L2aJ38sQZ5RxNPlGi53jkJxyHkloJymUuQF9zpexf36SXywxRKZkshr__BVIvzBce8pCqtwgT0OwAAZuB5_Iv5LeSgI6kPvICU-2IPAuQ2PCYRjqVpuglMxpL-jJKQGJ-VjvV7akqDpAFr8P2-A40B5Uue4VFU4IucVJXm7X1oPOADRB4BI3NSwsfo69Lr7jc8oh122J4rKTq-ZvrWLgz9w4ybRuguOPAhtoMo3EJwKHsRbo4RqKHLzCWpFArg%3D%3D) and find out exactly how you can help. We’d be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Don’t want to receive additional updates? Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.johncornyn.com/e/eh?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=70fa99f6450849768c9147d147173652&_e=pneA2nuT_dQ-3rEqr1cexhYpDjaAS_Gp3J6OFJDY3oSdghe1UrMbE_RB7qqRRmHjY8FEkvg6tRliVgbu8Mc-YCxKbQia0JGFI9pA2CiqUybGj9CL1w1HbpiVToflIKeIgg0Mh5XpQioEs3Rsa9ZgcYM_JiLockg2CFZMl6767nRkQaZPQM-57FvE-g0e2ahb7Cefr7la6NqqZtryIbw-talRSkIFnddslW7NhfKzBfKhR9xT7kKi7q3MNmmW_JzN)... But we’d rather you stick around. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Amazon's workers are subjected to horrific labor conditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Amazon publicly pledged to raise its minimum wage and working standards for its workers to the celebration of many, but a significant amount of their workers are hired through contractors \-- meaning that they aren't eligible for these new standards. The U.S. prides itself on our high expectations of working standards and workplace safety, but years of deregulation, lack of oversight, and big money in politics have left American workers unable to unionize, ask for living wages, or provide for their families. Democrats need to step up and defend our workers so that they too can live up to the American Dream. **[Please add your name if you agree that working in deplorable conditions is not okay and that Amazon workers deserve to earn enough money to make a living.](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4e/6e9863e8/15e4e898/1db08463/618881008/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/amazondrivers/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")** Thank you for standing with workers, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc4e/6e9863e8/15e4e898/1db08462/618881008/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/amazondrivers/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Team Beto
subject: Brand new polls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Tomorrow marks the beginning of November, which means brand new polls will
be conducted to see where each candidate is to start the new month. This
is a big opportunity for us to meet the DNC’s final requirement to qualify
for the November debate so Beto can join nine other candidates on the
stage.

But in order to do that, we need to ensure the people being polled say
Beto’s name when asked who they like. We have an aggressive grassroots
plan to make sure they do — with a big ad push, door-to-door engagement by
our organizers, and other proven strategies. But our ability to carry out
each part of this plan really depends entirely on how much we raise before
midnight tonight. The more we raise, the more people we can reach before
they’re polled.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41779?refcode=ema20191031-64776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=64776%2E444211%2ES702rf ]Will you chip in $3 so we can reach voters before the
next polls are conducted? Every dollar you pitch in before midnight
tonight will go towards running a robust campaign that ensures we do
everything possible to qualify for debates.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41779?refcode=ema20191031-64776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=64776%2E444211%2ES702rf ]Contribute $3

Here’s what the data shows:

* In June, polls were conducted on the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd of the month
* In August, FOUR polls started asking voters for their choice on the
1st
* In September, there were FIVE polls conducted during the first week
* And in October, there were FOUR more polls during just the first six
days

we know pollsters
will start asking voters what they think in the next couple of days — they
could even start tomorrow. And with little time left to qualify for the
November debate, we need to make the absolute most of each poll that’s
being conducted. Our organizers are ready to hit doors. Our ads are set to
go up online. All that’s left to decide is how much we can invest in them.

At the end of the day, we’ll make a decision on what we can afford to do.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41779?refcode=ema20191031-64776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=64776%2E444211%2ES702rf ]Will you rush $3 to help us reach voters across the
country as we fight for Beto’s place on the November debate stage? Every
dollar counts as we do everything possible to meet the DNC’s requirements.

Thanks,
Team Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41779?refcode=ema20191031-64776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64776%2E444211%2ES702rf ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191031footer&t=1023&refcode2=64776_444211_S702rf&akid=64776%2E444211%2ES702rf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=64776%2E444211%2ES702rf

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Dr. Lerah Lee
subject: How can I compete against millionaires????
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
Only SIX Hours until the October fundraising deadline. Will you chip-in to help me reach my goal?I'm a teacher and a mother of five; how can I compete against millionaires who can self-fund their entire campaigns? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_t=LMXxpzPQ7m_BsqmdN_uK-Gk7DoF95QVDbk5Pc1tl75_3C0SgWwtvinNIeFXB6GlfskSW-fViBc7Gd6tIY2jsY-4YGDVo1_zEBpGQYF3WlXMe07NlMzA2uyZR2rkodIyREvmZdIMUJp-JMkCuXntF4UxHV2VwZRlheVwv33vBn50%3D)
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KDTYXMLJ-2js-I3-10J9KZN5iJvwTSpiGU-GvJCfewZLEp2m73_adMuT7IFltnRUIZ4eUzD1dCqdO4AuSlxALh44aRykHwRSFjsDT9jIo3DtJdrzFfOLZuF0TdL9QUILvgNm2nu0TkxaafKRa_C0iA2vMyaRd0ZKp5p3iZcYTSDZaLLy4KG8zdg0f_IiYQz89fYCvUrTusj-NMBbRAderlYuD-o4OjLnKY8p-jgrb_ay)
Friend,

As we approach the end of October, I wanted to quickly say THANK YOU for all of the support that you’ve shown me so far in my campaign to become the second-ever black female Republican member of the U.S House!

Campaigning for Congress is a 7 day a week job. With the primary election just a little over five months away, **I’m working as if every day were election day.**
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KDTYXMLJ-2js-I3-10J9KZM8ie-LvAjyg20h1ReBXxZTPd5_pBw3L3nrugv0j4eyDtG9Ryv7mdonMOsQth--XP5GKQ51P0fmc9LefuC7MzXhN1PtoXhnip2h-gG95fpOeD8GCNt-Pw4-kPLIAz3o0hyZW_YIpVNCrHAq1dhDe63mfcU32ncdnI1IiWKw9xzmcEBOpyWAlBcrhNgH7A_0XS4bAjZFoRrDRF82AV06CdJc)
The stakes in my race are high, Friend. The biggest newspaper in Atlanta is even calling the race **_“among the most competitive in the country.”_** Last year, the race between the Republican incumbent and his Democrat challenger **was decided by less than $500 votes.**

**No one can really prepare you for the sticker shock** when you learn how much it costs to run a congressional campaign – I’m still trying to understand why these endeavors cost so much, but they do and in a district directly outside of metropolis like Atlanta – campaign costs rise precipitously.

I’ve set a goal of raising $100,000 in the month of October – and with a little less than 12 hours left to go, I’m still $10,000 short. **[Are you able to chip-in $100, $50, $25 or $10 today to help me make sure I meet my goal?](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KDTYXMLJ-2js-I3-10J9KZMnIkt995LPoYPrnDOmbvtoOl5nyDYVcPiub6VZZPOtCNpk9Bea78ABImt6o4EMfukvJNEvplF7tYVYBw0XMnTvJLU0TU97tVNKHHooH1Mc6ca-e58ybyKlbw4IPKfnHOQV0F4FShH6MT7_aXrnLig50a4y4E43MAlR63NV6kApomgjEXrQrSmBFhUqSh0tx9zh19Vgp-LCLRjJeXaPMSoW)**
**[<< Contribute $100 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KMPgY1uPpQMFwdeN6Wi7uoyFPhUouw9RqeOFmpWI3tPfFbOOFVYuw30Ew355qqMSLN-Q5t-RLyRqMxUjaEhojur5d5_RGWK62-n1zFPLvJNWN7hVyGFu0BHMRS9AWjUK8I73j2ziHtv4CEeWaHMHfn77_LxtPdCsJH2Krs55eTL4ZE_r6vqbpZ-HH52Kz15dWk9mtpINhwGrhP942D6mAcMXWWIfKtfp3lHRRya2AuNJ)**
**[<< Contribute $50 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KDfmeaiVfeh56BF2LLSq7uW9ZfRJ3ky21W5J0uo8BivOCNjW5id7ywOaAFdn6CNm43FyTVZ2bd1trQqCIC6HK0hZaDDrpyGk9c0E7MMn2nL6fcNv3EOAWTwbbxCwNHAXEnoHtv1wqrdEtMFl-8ScJkjq8Tgnn9Q7PcKNEKPKMJldyTO6Ez7_Dq3lzbuA6DA3v0EwpqM7hLyKMjXrqbv9pJi_k5lkhRS1txIV8PfbJPZ1)**
**[<< Contribute $25 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KGu_5hLbkvPIF_lGMUX2RY8wHaveNMjy0t69X9wmRrUyY7p0sYgBMxNOlCkAmFtzPjL6zZWkSBZam8z_-GT9A4FrzlPOwoxvlqfKgzM_GA5Ton2nmVayEnsDwvKtMqX9CVR2_IhFrxT2PByk06DV-Cwy-XbyKamb1UrVlefBttP1c0pJwgu8TAsJ7j1GYzIj0xlwfTTwXKLgGzcYtZYI4tBuMpQ-QfR99ZYyu5HRVvMn)**
**[<< Contribute $10 >>](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=a1376dafaef645058256d6b0189228ba&_e=ttu8lcHHSw6nm2fMPnp8k4wI78mmI3aBrK9178QmvTU2U1dfN9AJRI2I9sRs0r83uJdvxkMTVj0_E3PpH5W4KEfCRIHQ8RNW5FmsLxTVen4P2qbbGK6m6CZ98gRt1mr3RXCC9q4qd2jscuQ6QZvN9ym7YTGKtEda-Q0bh6sKkZW_EY2E5-qgRFvDFAsL_3cSQ_Rf65Ywnvs5AKKOn1D7pY9E7W1s_YtOxgzq8z3RFWIQlUgu0iRDlZd_SYqlCKcFu3_HQKOO85mqhX1miHVs7Ph2G5xggnuyRn6j9nic4tKrDLDT4Bi9BD-57LECFGGa)**
And unlike the wealthy, politically connected Republicans I’m running against – I’m unable to self-fund.

**Here’s what I’m up against:**
1. A former Home Depot executive who loaned her campaign $250,000
2. An emergency room doctor who gave his campaign $301,000
3. A career politician who loaned her campaign more than $600,000

**I’m a teacher, mother of five and first-time candidate** ; I’ve never had the luxury of making friends out of liquor titans or lobbyists who can bundle hundreds of thousands of dollars to my campaign – which is why I have to ask for financial help from trusted grassroots conservatives like you, Friend.

Blessings always,

Dr. Lerah lee
Conservative for U.S. House

clean_body: Only SIX Hours until the October fundraising deadline. Will you chip-in to help me reach my goal?I'm a teacher and a mother of five; how can I compete against millionaires who can self-fund their entire campaigns? Don't want to receive our emails? Friend, As we approach the end of October, I wanted to quickly say THANK YOU for all of the support that you’ve shown me so far in my campaign to become the second-ever black female Republican member of the U.S House! Campaigning for Congress is a 7 day a week job. With the primary election just a little over five months away, I’m working as if every day were election day. The stakes in my race are high, Friend. The biggest newspaper in Atlanta is even calling the race “among the most competitive in the country.” Last year, the race between the Republican incumbent and his Democrat challenger was decided by less than $500 votes. No one can really prepare you for the sticker shock when you learn how much it costs to run a congressional campaign – I’m still trying to understand why these endeavors cost so much, but they do and in a district directly outside of metropolis like Atlanta – campaign costs rise precipitously. I’ve set a goal of raising $100,000 in the month of October – and with a little less than 12 hours left to go, I’m still $10,000 short. And unlike the wealthy, politically connected Republicans I’m running against – I’m unable to self-fund. Here’s what I’m up against: 1. A former Home Depot executive who loaned her campaign $250,000 2. An emergency room doctor who gave his campaign $301,000 3. A career politician who loaned her campaign more than $600,000 I’m a teacher, mother of five and first-time candidate ; I’ve never had the luxury of making friends out of liquor titans or lobbyists who can bundle hundreds of thousands of dollars to my campaign – which is why I have to ask for financial help from trusted grassroots conservatives like you, Friend. Blessings always, Dr. Lerah lee Conservative for U.S. House | | Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress

name: Ed Markey
subject: Before the trick-or-treaters arrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: I know Halloween parties and trick-or-treating will be starting soon, but I just talked with my team, and we're only 189 donations away from our end-of-month goal.

I wouldn't ask if this weren't so important. _**[Will you chip in $27 and help us cross the finish line before midnight?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-103119_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

End-of-month goals are huge indicators of our grassroots strength. Hitting our deadline goal will show everyone that our people-powered movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- is unstoppable.

_**[Even $27 will make a huge difference in helping us reach our goal.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-103119_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

So if you have a minute, please use this link to donate tonight.

_**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ed-markey-october-goal](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-103119_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Or, if you can, click the quick-donate button below and make your donation instantly with ActBlue Express.

**[Donate $27 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-103119_3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thanks for all you do,

Ed

name: Mike Franken
subject: RE: Before the end of the month.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Can you chip in to our campaign? In this email, I lay out just how your donations have already made a difference and set us apart in this race.
|
---
I'm going to get right to the point, friends. It's the end of the month and once again, I'm asking for your help before midnight tonight. Grassroots contributions have allowed our campaign to remain principled in some tough moments -- holding Joni Ernst accountable for kowtowing to Donald Trump and for doing a TV ad explaining that an inquiry must occur if wrongdoing is expected. Hence, the impeachment inquiry must proceed. [**We 're running a principles-first campaign to flip this seat. I need your support to do it!**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc3a/1747620556/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191031_fr_em_topper") Very respectfully,
Mike Franken | [Contribute today](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc3b/1747620556/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191031_fr_em_toper_button")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mike Franken
Date: October 30, 2019
Subject: Before the end of the month
| | Thanks for being a part of the Franken for Iowa team, friends. **[In just a moment I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign before the end of the month](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc34/1747620556/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191031_fr_em_bottom"). **But first, I want to let you know how your support has laid the groundwork for us to succeed.
* We raised over $150,000 in just 5 weeks from donors just like you.
* I was the first candidate in this race to put up a television ad calling for the impeachment inquiry to proceed as a result of President Trump's actions with Ukraine's leaders. This ad was funded by our grassroots supporters.
* We had the resources necessary to stay true to our shared principles and to speak the truth -- regardless of the slanted messaging coming from the GOP.

We're putting Washington insiders on notice -- and it's working. But we're still the underdogs in this race and there's a long way to go. Now, we've got to keep the momentum going. And I need to ask for your support once again. [**Can you invest in this campaign --in an underdog -- right now? A contribution of $5 will go a long way to keeping me in this fight.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc34/1747620556/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191031_fr_em_bottom") | [Contribute today](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc35/1747620556/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191031_fr_em_bottom_button")
---
This campaign is about what's right for Iowa -- and I believe with a thoughtful strategy backed by a solid plan to execute, we can win. We're sticking to our principles. We're getting noticed.
We can't slow our efforts now.
[**Make a contribution now before the end of the month to support our unrelenting, principles-first campaign to flip this seat.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc34/1747620556/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191031_fr_em_bottom")
Very respectfully,
Mike Franken
|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---
Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Franken for Iowa
PO Box 3171
Sioux City, IA 51102

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2400/33365068/4a644600/3f8bbc36/1747620556/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Address Gun Violence Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=eb2f60cc95-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-eb2f60cc95-32267927
Hello Peter,

100 people are killed in the U.S. by gun violence every day, not to mention the thousands more who are injured.

Around our homes, on our streets, and in our schools — it feels like nowhere is safe anymore. This isn’t the reality any of us want. Parents shouldn’t have to send their kids to school fearing for their safety; worshipers shouldn’t feel at risk when attending service; party-goers shouldn’t wonder if their lives are in danger when they go to celebrate.

Saturday, two young men were shot and killed and a dozen were injured while attending a Halloween party in Greenville (https://www.nbcdfw.com/news/local/Mass-Shooting-Reported-at-Homecoming-Party-in-Greenville-Outside-of-Dallas-563934821.html?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=eb2f60cc95-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-eb2f60cc95-32267927) .

Something has to change.

My heart breaks for their families, but I know words aren’t nearly enough. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. We need action, and we need it NOW. This violence has to end. We MUST fight for sensible gun safety laws.

As your representative, I will address our gun violence epidemic head-on. No more empty promises from ineffective leaders in the face of yet another mass shooting that terrorizes our city or our country.

I am committed to enacting sensible gun legislation including: banning weapons of war, requiring background checks on every firearm sale, and closing the “boyfriend loophole.”

It’s time for real leadership on this issue. Only then can we end this violent epidemic and hold the corrupt accountable.

- Marc

clean_body: Hello Peter, 100 people are killed in the U.S. by gun violence every day, not to mention the thousands more who are injured. Around our homes, on our streets, and in our schools — it feels like nowhere is safe anymore. This isn’t the reality any of us want. Parents shouldn’t have to send their kids to school fearing for their safety; worshipers shouldn’t feel at risk when attending service; party-goers shouldn’t wonder if their lives are in danger when they go to celebrate. Saturday, two young men were shot and killed and a dozen were injured while attending a Halloween party in Greenville () . Something has to change. My heart breaks for their families, but I know words aren’t nearly enough. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. We need action, and we need it NOW. This violence has to end. We MUST fight for sensible gun safety laws. As your representative, I will address our gun violence epidemic head-on. No more empty promises from ineffective leaders in the face of yet another mass shooting that terrorizes our city or our country. I am committed to enacting sensible gun legislation including: banning weapons of war, requiring background checks on every firearm sale, and closing the “boyfriend loophole.” It’s time for real leadership on this issue. Only then can we end this violent epidemic and hold the corrupt accountable. - Marc Donate Now () ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress. Copyright © 2019 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Marc Flores for Congress P.O. Box 924332 Houston, TX 77292 Add us to your address book () Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences () or ** unsubscribe from this list () .

body:

| | I'm floored. I was worried we wouldn't meet our end-of-month goal for the first time in my entire campaign. _**But after President Obama called you to action, my team tells me we 're about to have a HISTORIC fundraising comeback!**_ [_**I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to meet my end-of-month goal, WIN my race, and DEFEAT McConnell 's Republican Senate. Will you be the gift that puts me over the top? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191031_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I know it was grassroots supporters like you who helped me take back the House last year. **And in moments like these, I 'm reminded just how powerful your support is. ** You know what's at stake with another two years of Mitch McConnell. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44a/18e32a7f/53eab302/7b22ec6c/2638261162/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44a/18e32a7f/53eab302/7b22ec6d/2638261162/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b44a/18e32a7f/53eab302/7b22ec62/2638261162/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

body:
We're so close to our goal, and you could literally be the one to put us over the top.

| Friend,

I am so grateful to all of you who have stood with us this week. We are so close to our goal, but we are not there yet.

We are only $2,452 away, but if we don't get to our end-of-month goal by midnight tonight, Tom Cotton will think he has this election in the bag.

**We can 't afford six more years of Cotton.**

**[This is our chance at a better future for our state. Let's not waste it. Please chip in $10 now so we can meet our goal and send Cotton packing.](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-oct-eom?refcode=em191031EOM5-a&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** We can get this done, but we can't do it without you.

Let's go,

Josh

If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. name: Mark Warner
subject: Let's win this together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Today's a big day for me. It's Halloween (my favorite holiday), the Nats are World Series champs, and I'm about to hit the road for a final weekend of campaigning before Virginia's elections on Tuesda
|
---
| | Derek,

Today's a big day for me. It's Halloween (my favorite holiday), the Nats are World Series champs, and I'm about to hit the road for a final weekend of campaigning before Virginia's elections on Tuesday.

For the better part of this past year, I've been traveling all over Virginia supporting more than 50 Democrats running up and down the ballot. I know I've got my own election coming up soon, but this is important to me. **We need to flip the General Assembly because, frankly, health care access, public education, and commonsense gun law reform here in Virginia -- not to mention the ERA -- are all on the ballot next week. **

But today is also the last day of the month, which means my campaign is facing an important fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. I've been focused on my work in the Senate and Tuesday's General Assembly elections. But starting Wednesday, we're going to enter a new phase of this campaign, and we need to hit the ground running.

**The truth is, Derek, if we're going to hit our 400 new supporter goal by midnight tonight, I'll need your help. So I want to personally ask you, will you make your first contribution to our campaign before midnight?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through clean_body: Today's a big day for me. It's Halloween (my favorite holiday), the Nats are World Series champs, and I'm about to hit the road for a final weekend of campaigning before Virginia's elections on Tuesda | | | Derek, Today's a big day for me. It's Halloween (my favorite holiday), the Nats are World Series champs, and I'm about to hit the road for a final weekend of campaigning before Virginia's elections on Tuesday. For the better part of this past year, I've been traveling all over Virginia supporting more than 50 Democrats running up and down the ballot. I know I've got my own election coming up soon, but this is important to me. We need to flip the General Assembly because, frankly, health care access, public education, and commonsense gun law reform here in Virginia -- not to mention the ERA -- are all on the ballot next week. But today is also the last day of the month, which means my campaign is facing an important fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. I've been focused on my work in the Senate and Tuesday's General Assembly elections. But starting Wednesday, we're going to enter a new phase of this campaign, and we need to hit the ground running. The truth is, Derek, if we're going to hit our 400 new supporter goal by midnight tonight, I'll need your help. So I want to personally ask you, will you make your first contribution to our campaign before midnight? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" In addition to campaigning for Virginia Democrats, I've been busy building up the campaign operation we're going to need to win in 2020. My last campaign was a close one, and with a field of GOP opponents now lining up to run against me, I'm not taking any chances. Already, we've made key hires and started developing the game plan to keep Virginia blue in 2020 and beat Donald Trump. But frankly, all of that hinges on hitting our fundraising goals and staying on track. That's why I'm asking you for your help before midnight tonight. We're still 126 supporters short of our 400 new supporter goal, but according to the numbers my team just sent me, we could easily hit our goal if everyone reading this chipped in $5 right now. The truth is, in an election year this important, every dollar we raise is going to make a difference. "" Thanks so much, for everything you do. Your support means a lot to me, and I feel incredibly lucky to have you in my corner. Let's win this together. Happy Halloween, Mark | ** ""** Your supporter record is based on our digital contribution records associated with this email address. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc873/3eb3e2fc/55bb4dc0/744d808e/1265214207/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191031_em_adv_hq&source=20191031_em_adv_hq")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc873/3eb3e2fc/55bb4dc0/744d808d/1265214207/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191031_em_adv_hq&source=20191031_em_adv_hq"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc873/3eb3e2fc/55bb4dc0/744d808c/1265214207/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191031_em_adv_hq&source=20191031_em_adv_hq"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Nancy Pelosi comes out against one-party impeachment
body:
The first act of House Democrats’ impeachment sham operated in secret, depriving President Donald J. Trump of the due process rights... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e37f2258e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 31, 2019
---
| | |
# **A Halloween impeachment hoax—and other spooky stories**

**The first act** of House Democrats’ impeachment sham operated in secret, depriving President Donald J. Trump of the due process rights entitled to every American citizen. Today, Democrats moved into phase two of their phony inquiry—and continue to leave both the American people and the White House in the dark.

**“We don’t [even] know** the rules yet, for the White House,” Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham told Fox News today. “Are we even going to get to be involved? I don’t think so. It’s my understanding that we’re not going to get to defend ourselves until it goes to the Judiciary Committee—and that’s not how it works in America.”

** ****White House Press Sec:** [The President did nothing wrong. Democrats know it.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab4679e5d9&e=3ee4985eea)

**For weeks,** Democrats and their media mouthpieces tried to push the narrative that some Republicans in Congress could join Democrats in voting for their impeachment hoax—offering their probe a veneer of bipartisan credibility. The left hoped that repeating that storyline over and over again might help turn it into a reality.

**The opposite happened**. Two House Democrats joined with every single Republican member in voting against the Pelosi–Schiff impeachment sham. So the media was right that a bipartisan consensus might emerge. It’s just not the kind that they’d hoped for.

**Today’s vote** puts Democratic leaders in an awkward spot. Just months ago, Speaker Nancy Pelosi said she opposed moving forward with an impeachment effort that didn’t earn overwhelming bipartisan trust. With members of both parties now objecting to impeachment, she must decide whether House Democrats should ignore their own words.

**“I’m not for impeachment,”** she told CNN in March. “Impeachment is so divisive to the country that unless there's something so compelling and overwhelming and bipartisan, I don't think we should go down that path, because it divides the country.”

**The left’s media allies** will try to help spin today’s vote for House Democrats. Over the next few days, watch as the coverage focuses entirely on the Republican response to impeachment—and ignores the Democrats who joined them. They don’t fit the narrative.

**Americans are clearly frustrated** with this hypocrisy. “There’s polls out today that show people are frustrated and disappointed with all the impeachment farce that’s happening,” Press Secretary Grisham said. “We know that in the White House. We’re going to keep working”—to deliver peace, a booming economy, and real national security.

**Congressional Democrats** have declared the President guilty until proven innocent. It doesn’t matter that the released Ukraine transcript contradicts their own version of events. It doesn’t matter that they announced impeachment efforts _before_ gathering any of the evidence—or before even calling for a vote on whether to move forward.

**This impeachment hoax** began with a top Democrat reading a fake phone transcript of President Trump before quickly moving the proceedings behind closed doors. Instead of attracting Republicans, it has only repelled Democrats.

**Speaker Pelosi** is right that a partisan impeachment is wrong for America. It’s time for her to stand by her words. It’s time for the House to have a real leader once again.

[Read today’s full statement from Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5097822209&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** **Watch** : [Democrats are “blatantly ignoring” the real needs of Americans. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6416e0cff2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: Trick-or-treat at the White House!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef50d1ce4c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** and First Lady Melania Trump celebrated their third Halloween at the White House on Monday evening, welcoming military families and local schoolchildren with their parents for festivities on the South Lawn.

**With the White House grounds** decked out in Halloween decorations, kids dressed as tiny dragons, ghouls, ghosts, witches, and other fun things joined the celebration as the President and First Lady handed out commemorative candy.

[READ: First Lady announces Halloween at the White House.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b69582558&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour
| **President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump at the 2019 White House Halloween Event** | October 28, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd0d2fa065&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28d3b02735&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=34e2369b93)
---

---

Friend \- it’s Halloween, and the scariest thing on my mind is unhinged Democrats trying to overturn the results of the 2016 election. They’re determined to impeach President Trump before he wins re-election, and it’s up to us in the conservative grassroots to stop them. If you want to stop Nancy Pelosi and her socialist friends in the House from impeaching President Trump, please step up as one of 60 Sixth District Hoosiers to contribute to our October End of Month Impeachment Defense Fund – before midnight tonight. Use this personalized, secure link to chip in ANY amount by tonight at 11:59pm: Thanks, -Greg \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Pence Finance Team Subject: make Pelosi hear us To: 60 Hoosiers Needed STOP Impeachment Chip in by October 31st to stand with Greg Friend, Make America Great Again – it’s what President Trump promised, and it’s what he has delivered for us. A historically strong economy and job numbers. Fixing our immigration crisis. Cutting regulations and confirming record numbers of judges to the federal bench. [ [by tomorrow @ 11:59pm] Chip in to help me stop Democrats from impeaching President Trump ]() So how do Democrats react to this great American renewal? Not by reaching across the aisle to work with us on a commonsense infrastructure plan, or ANYTHING else of value to the American people. Instead, Democrats have chosen to IMPEACH our duly elected president. Greg refuses to stand idly by as they make a petty political fight into another ugly, drawn-out conflict the American people are forced to watch.
